请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000951
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the contiguous United States inferred by the inversion of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC emissions using satellite observation\", \"md_filename\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 24, \"content_length\": 1069, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_000951", "paperid": "paper_001", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "In this study, we use the tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns from the OMI operational retrieval products (Level 2 and version 3) released by the NASA Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Service Center (GES DISC). The tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001081
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_001", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the contiguous United States inferred by the inversion of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC emissions using satellite observation\", \"md_filename\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont_1.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 24, \"content_length\": 1069, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_001081", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "In this study, we use the tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns from the OMI operational retrieval products (Level 2 and version 3) released by the NASA Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Service Center (GES DISC). The tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002766
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_002766", "paperid": "paper_011", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"HTAP_v2.2: a mosaic of regional and global emission grid maps for 2008 and 2010 to study hemispheric transport of air pollution\", \"md_filename\": \"HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 141, \"content_length\": 69, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "# 3.6 Qualitative assessment of the uncertainty of emission grid maps"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003164
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"MIX: a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission inventory under the international collaboration framework of the MICS-Asia and HTAP\", \"md_filename\": \"MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 217, \"content_length\": 1551, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_003164", "type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_013"}
            Content: {"text": "The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003990
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_012", "chunkid": "chunk_003990", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission inventory for industrial sources: From national to provincial and city scales\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 119, \"content_length\": 2478, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the \"top-down\" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of \"top-down\" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\\%$  and  $25\\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\\%$ ,  $23\\%$ , and  $20\\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the \"bottom-up\" emission ratio estimates."}
            

```

### [16:21:25] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]

It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\\\\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\\\\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}", "type": "picture", "chunkid": "chunk_004582"}
            Content: {"text": "Figure 2 illustrates sector-specific and regional emission totals for various pollutants in 2010 using pie charts overlaid on maps, highlighting energy, industry, transport, and residential contributions. The figure provides insight into regional emission contributions by sector, emphasizing the distribution and intensity across different pollutants to inform chemical transport model integration."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000493
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_000493", "type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_031", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Air quality changes in China 2013-2020: Effectiveness of clean coal technology policies\", \"md_filename\": \"Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 52, \"content_length\": 502, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "Compared with traditional techniques for forecasting air pollution, namely empirical approaches and simple statistical models, deep learning approaches can handle complex and non-linear relationships among air quality variables which allow them to better capture the pollution episode forecasts. Therefore, deep learning has been identified as a vital tool for air quality modelling and forecasting, which helps in recognizing pollution hot spots (Schmidhuber, 2015; Ong et al., 2016; Li et al., 2017)."}

The architecture of the tailored CNN-LSTM network.\", \"save_path\": \"C:\\\\liuxingyu\\\\multisubspace-data\\\\predataprocess\\\\paper_md\\\\Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven\\\\figure_4.jpg\", \"functional_roles\": {\"main_role\": \"Methodology & Design\", \"sub_roles\": [\"Elucidate Model Architecture\", \"Illustrate Algorithm Process\"]}, \"visual_type\": {\"main_type\": \"Diagrams & Schematics\", \"sub_types\": [\"Architecture Diagram\"]}, \"key_entities\": [\"CNN-LSTM\", \"predictive model\", \"encoder-decoder structure\", \"air quality forecasting\", \"convolution layer\", \"LSTM\", \"AQI\"], \"concise_summary\": \"The figure illustrates the CNN-LSTM architecture used for air quality prediction, showcasing the model's encoder-decoder structure and workflow for feature extraction and forecasting.\", \"inferred_insight\": \"The tailored CNN-LSTM model is designed to effectively capture temporal-spatial correlations in air quality data, reducing training issues and improving prediction accuracy.\", \"references\": [\"Considering the data features of high-dimension, multivariable, nonlinearity and temporal-spatial correlation, and with the application of Keras and TensorFlow, a predictive model combining CNN and LSTM is applied and tailored in this study. The architecture and workflows are shown in Fig. 4 and summarized as follows.\", \"As shown in Fig. 4, the general architecture of the predictive model is an encoder-decoder structure. The first half of the network is CNN and is utilized for feature extraction of input data. The latter half is LSTM, analyzing the features extracted by CNN and then forecasting the AQI of the next point in time.\", \"backpropagation and learning the input sequence with longer time steps. Further, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have a remarkable advantage in extracting data features and reducing dimensions, which could alleviate the problems of slow training and overfitting in fully connected networks (Alzubaidi et al., 2021). Correspondingly, many variants of the CNN-LSTM combination have been constructed for capturing the spatiotemporal dependencies in air quality forecasting tasks (Donahue et al., 2015; Vinyals et al., 2015; Qin et al., 2019), as it would create a great synergy than the individual models on their own. Specifically, first performing feature extraction using CNN, and then inputting the feature values into the LSTM architecture.\", \"The study obtained the data including a total of 1440 daily air quality and meteorological data (January 22, 2016, to December 31, 2019) from 31 provincial capital cities in the Chinese mainland,  $60\\\\%$  of which are chosen as the training set,  $20\\\\%$  as the validation set and  $20\\\\%$  as the test set. After determining the best basic network architecture for the current prediction tasks, models are set up in units of cities, and the training set is used to train the tailored CNN-LSTM models. The accuracy indicators of the model prediction results of 31 cities, namely RMSE values averaging 22.06, models perform well overall, indicating that the applied CNN-LSTM network has good capabilities for AQI prediction (Jin et al., 2020; Mao et al., 2021).\", \"Renew.             --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000483
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_031", "chunkid": "chunk_000483", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Air quality changes in China 2013-2020: Effectiveness of clean coal technology policies\", \"md_filename\": \"Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 37, \"content_length\": 703, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "one-third of cities. Due to the shutdown of industrial activities and traffic volume, an obvious decline in primary air pollutants was observed in most Chinese cities in 2020 (Liu et al., 2020; Yuan et al., 2021). This will undoubtedly cause high uncertainty while investigating the effect of CCTPs on air quality. Therefore, the following data is only extracted from 2013 to 2019, and the AQI in 2020 is predicted through a deep learning network. Subsequently, the investigated data covers 8 years before and after the policy node, namely from 2013 to 2020, which is adequate for policy evaluation (Yu et al., 2021). In the following, air quality and meteorological data are obtained via a web crawler."}

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

            Content: {"text": "To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison"}

            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"HTAP_v2.2: a mosaic of regional and global emission grid maps for 2008 and 2010 to study hemispheric transport of air pollution\", \"md_filename\": \"HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 10, \"content_length\": 623, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_002652", "paperid": "paper_011"}
            Content: {"text": "The HTAP_v2.2 air pollutant grid maps are considered to combine latest available regional information within a complete global data set. The disaggregation by sectors, high spatial and temporal resolution and detailed information on the data sources and references used will provide the user the required transparency. Because HTAP_v2.2 contains primarily official and/or widely used regional emission grid maps, it can be recommended as a global baseline emission inventory, which is regionally accepted as a reference and from which different scenarios assessing emission reduction policies at a global scale could start."}

            Content: {"text": "The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  grid resolution). It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5."}

### [16:21:39] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

The total length is  $2,107\\\\mathrm{m}$ ; cross-sectional area is  $33.75\\\\mathrm{m}^2$ . To continuously monitor major air pollutants from vehicle exhaust, we installed two integrated air pollution monitoring units at  $150\\\\mathrm{m}$  away from the inlet and outlet of the tunnel, respectively. The height of the unit was about  $1.2\\\\mathrm{m}$ . Fig. 2 shows the location of the tunnel and the monitoring sites. There were 4 sensors which could separately monitor NO,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$ , CO, and  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations in each unit. NO,  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$ , and CO were detected using electrochemical method. Simulation domain.\", \"save_path\": \"C:\\\\liuxingyu\\\\multisubspace-data\\\\predataprocess\\\\paper_md\\\\Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor\\\\figure_1.jpg\", \"functional_roles\": {\"main_role\": \"Data & Experimental Setup\", \"sub_roles\": [\"Introduce Experimental Setup\"]}, \"visual_type\": {\"main_type\": \"Geospatial Visualizations\", \"sub_types\": [\"Map\"]}, \"key_entities\": [\"MEGAN\", \"CMAQ\", \"WRF model\", \"BVOC emissions\", \"Tibetan Plateau\", \"Inner Mongolia\", \"PRD\", \"BTH\", \"SCB\", \"YRD\"], \"concise_summary\": \"The figure depicts the simulation domain over China, illustrating terrain height and key regions like Tibetan Plateau and Inner Mongolia.\", \"inferred_insight\": \"The figure underscores the simulation domain's geographic and topographic details crucial for understanding BVOC emissions and air quality modeling over China.\", \"references\": [\"MEGAN v2.1 (Guenther et al. 2012) was utilized to estimate BVOC emissions in China with a  $27\\\\mathrm{-km}$  horizontal grid spacing domain (shown in Fig. 1). The inputs for MEGAN include the LAI, PFTs, emission factors, and meteorological data (e.g., solar radiation, temperature, relative humidity and soil moisture). The monthly average LAI was obtained from the 8-day MODIS LAI product (MOD15A2, 2017) with the same horizontal resolution as the study domain, as shown in Fig. 2. The PFT map was obtained from the MODIS MCD12Q1 product and regridded into the WRF domain to compute the fraction of each PFT in each grid (Fig. 3). The default MEGAN emission factors  $(\\\\mathrm{mg~m}^{-2}\\\\mathrm{h}^{-1})$  with a resolution of  $30\\\\mathrm{s}$ $(< 1\\\\mathrm{km})$ , which reflect the BVOC emission rate under standard canopy conditions, were leveraged (http://lar.wsu.edu/megan/guides.html). Meteorological conditions were simulated by the WRF model. A one-year MEGAN simulation was performed for 2017 in China.\", \"We set up Community Multiscale Air Quality model (CMAQ version 5.2.1, Foroutan et al. (2017)) (https://www.cmascenter.org/cmaq/) to simulate the atmospheric composition over China with the same domain and grid resolution for WRF and MEGAN. The initial and boundary conditions for CMAQ simulation were based on the CMAQ default profiles which represent unpolluted atmosphere. The CB05 represented the gas phase, and AERO6 represented the aerosol chemical mechanisms (Appel et al. 2013). For the simulation of SOA, we used the default SOA module of the CMAQv5.2.1. It simulates NMVOC-derived SOA with a two-product model, treats primary organic aerosol (POA) as nonvolatile and nonreactive, and ignores IVOC emissions. Carlton et al. (2010) provided a detailed description of aerosol chemistry in CMAQ, including SOA formation from benzene, isoprene and sesquiterpenes. The POA oxidation mechanism is described in Simon and Bhave (2012). The new updates in CMAQ v5.2.1 accounts for the semivolatile\", \"partitioning and gas-phase aging of these POA compounds consistent with experimentally derived parameterizations (Murphy et al. 2017), SOA properties and IEPOX organosulfate formation rate constant were updated (Pye et al. 2017). We selected July as representative of summertime and acquired anthropogenic emissions for the CMAQ domain from the MEIC emission inventory 2016 developed by Tsinghua University (http://www.meicmodel.org/), which contains monthly gridded  $(0.25\\\\times 0.25^{\\\\circ})$  emissions information for anthropogenic emissions in the CB05 mechanism. The biogenic emissions were modeled using MEGAN (described in Section 2.2).\", \"Fig. S1 and S2 show the seasonal spatial distribution of temperature at  $2\\\\mathrm{m}$  (T2) and the daily downward shortwave radiation (DSW) simulated by the WRF model. And these meteorological factors were evaluated using in situ measurement data from 824 and 84 national meteorological sites, respectively. The in situ measurement data are from the China Meteorological Data Sharing Service System (http://data.cma.cn/). Table 2 presents the verification statistics for the average daily T2 and DSW among all sites. As shown in Table 2, the mean error (ME), mean bias (MB), correlation coefficient (r) and root mean square error (RMSE) of station-averaged hourly T2 series are 2.47, -1.26, 0.95 and  $2.59^{\\\\circ}\\\\mathrm{C}$ , respectively. The simulation yields cooling biases of  $-0.98$ ,  $-0.90$ ,  $-1.70$  and  $-1.18^{\\\\circ}\\\\mathrm{C}$  in spring, summer, fall and winter, respectively. The ME, MB, r and RMSE values for the annual DSW series are 36.00,  $-29.88$ , 0.80 and  $81.33\\\\mathrm{Wm}^{-2}$ , and the DSW simulation yields underestimations of 32.12, 43.61, 24.25 and  $19.38\\\\mathrm{Wm}^{-2}$  in spring, summer, fall and winter, respectively. It is because that the WRF model overestimate the cloud coverage which lead to the slightly underestimation on T2 and DSW (Wang et al. 2010; Wen et al. 2014). Compared with other studies on yearly long WRF simulation in China (Wang et al., 2014; Ying et al. 2014; Zhang et al., 2012), these biases are\", \"Fig. 2. Seasonal spatial distribution of the LAI in the model domain.\", \"between our results and those of Klinger et al. (2002). It is mainly because that Klinger et al. (2002) did not include emissions from the shrubs and assumed that BVOC emissions emitted from forests in China with  $251,283\\\\mathrm{km}^2$  which is smaller than the domain of our study. Therefore, variations in these factors in different years may be the cause of the uncertainty in the modeling simulations. However, large discrepancies in the emission estimates still exist among this study and previous studies. These differences result from the use of different emission factors, land cover distributions, meteorological conditions and model algorithms in developing the emission inventories, as discussed above.\", \"Fig. 3. Seasonal distributions of the proportions of PFTs in the model domain.\", \"Fig. 7a-c shows the simulated and observed daily 1-h maximum  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$ $(\\\\mathrm{DM1O_3})$  concentration over China in July 2017. In general, the model successfully captured the spatial pattern over the simulated domain with highest  $\\\\mathrm{DM1O_3}$  areas centralized in the east, especially in the BTH, PRD, YRD and SCB regions due to the relatively large  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  and VOC emission and favorable meteorological conditions for ozone formation in these areas (e.g., little rain and strong solar radiation).             --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000953
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the contiguous United States inferred by the inversion of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC emissions using satellite observation\", \"md_filename\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 27, \"content_length\": 1264, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_001", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_000953"}
            Content: {"text": "To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison"}

## 关键洞察
- Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.
- The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.
- The map set displays Asian spatial distributions of gaseous and aerosol species (e.g., SO₂, NOₓ, CO, PM₂.₅, PM₁₀) from the MIX Asian emission inventory for 2010, highlighting finer‑scale patterns achieved by integrating high‑resolution regional datasets such as CPED (China), JEI‑DB (Japan) and OPRF (Japan).
- The bar chart displays the percentage distribution of AQI, PM2.5, SO2, and NO2 for all samples and separately for Eastern and Western regions, highlighting regional differences that support the claim that the WCHP project influences air‑quality indicators across diverse geographical areas.
- HTAP_v2.2 包含 0.1°×0.2°（文中为 0.1°×0.1°）网格的年度与月度排放数据，覆盖 SO₂、NOₓ、CO、NMVOC、NH₃ 以及 PM₁₀、PM₂.₅、BC、OC 等关键大气成分，为化学传输模型提供了细粒度的源谱信息。

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

### [16:22:33] Orchestrator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 任务整体介绍
        你是【首席科学家】，你处在一个科学知识发现团队中，你们团队的目标是以用户输入的初始问题为目标，深度并且广泛地进行论文调研，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        为了进行科学知识发现，你和你的团队根据已经搜索并且阅读的论文信息正在构建一棵【科研证据树】。
        # 团队整体介绍
        你所处的科学知识发现团队中，你是首席科学家，即实验室领导的身份。通过输出的检索任务，你负责把握整个团队进行论文文献调研的方向，你的作用非常重要。
        你的团队中有许多验证人员，即实验室研究生的身份。他们会根据你的检索策略去检索论文数据，阅读检索到的图片和文本，进行初步的总结，评估检索到的内容是否符合预期，对每一个结果是否应该进行扩展阅读提出建议，并且将结果反馈给你。
        你的团队中有若干思考人员，即实验室小导师的身份。他们是一个小团队，会负责根据验证人员的反馈，对检索到的内容进行深度思考，挖掘知识之间的关联，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识，形成最终的科学回答报告。
        # 你的核心职责
        作为团队大脑，你不直接阅读原文，你的工作是**把握方向**：
        1.  **初始规划**：面对用户的新问题，你需要构思 3-5 个不同维度的切入点。
        2.  **动态决策**：根据【验证人员】（Evaluator）反馈的评估报告，决定这棵树该怎么长。
        3.  **方向把控**：你需要平衡【广度】（寻找新灵感）和【深度】（验证证据链）。

        # 决策逻辑：
        1. 继续检索时，你需要输出一系列策略的列表。每一个元素是一个策略，以字典的形式输出。
        2. 每个策略字典中，它首先有action固定为call_tool。
            ParentNode：int类型，你的决策可以来源于某一个搜索策略对应的节点，也可以来源于你综合所有结果进行的思考。这个属性命名为”ParentNode“。如果来源于节点，你应该将这个节点的ID作为ParentNode；如果是你综合考虑的结果，你将属性设置为"0"。
            tool_name：str类型。根据你选择的策略决定，是strategy_semantic_searchstrategy_metadata_search。
            args：dict类型。调用检索工具时需要的参数。根据你选择的策略决定，按照下面两种策略的要求去添加args具体的内容。
            reason：str类型。你选择这个策略的原因，不要太长。
        可选策略：
        1. 深度挖掘 (DEEPER - Exploitation)
        * 触发条件：验证人员报告某个节点是【DEEPER】（高价值），你查看验证人员的汇报，发现确实有所帮助，决定在这个论文的基础上进行进一步探索。深度挖掘策略时，策略的ParentNode必须是一个节点的ID。
        * 操作：返回给你的数据中包含 `paper_id`（论文ID）你可以选择paper_id去进行查询同一篇论文。在深度挖掘中你要严格使用你认为的ParentNode的信息，不能随意生成新的关键词。
        * 目的：将孤立的线索变成完整的证据链。
        * 参数：如果选择deeper策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_metadata_search，args中包含paper_id。
        2. 广度扩展 (BROADER - Exploration)**
        * 触发条件：
            1. 当前返回了大量被重复搜索的论文，说明该方向已经几乎彻底研究透彻，需要寻找新的可能的领域。 此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            2. 当前返回的论文数量过少，说明对应的搜索策略不能在数据库中找到支持的论文，或者是找到的论文与用户问题相关性太低。需要寻找新的可能的搜索条件。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            3. 针对某一条返回的检索和评估结果，验证人员提出了使用新的专业名词的建议，或者你查看后认为可以提炼出一个新的关键词进行检索。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为对应节点的ID。
        * 操作：根据验证人员的建议或者你自己的判断，你可以选择使用新的专业名词或者新的关键词进行检索。
        * 目的：扩展搜索范围，寻找新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        * 参数：如果选择broader策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_semantic_search，query_intent是你决定的下一步用于检索的文本词句。
        生成每个策略前，请先在内部思考：1. 这个策略与用户原始问题的相关性打分（0-10）2. 这个策略与已有历史策略的新颖性（0-10）只有两项都≥7才允许输出。
        
        # 历史策略参考
        在生成新策略时，请参考已有的历史策略，避免重复，并尝试在已有策略的基础上进行创新和优化。系统会为你提供当前会话中的所有历史策略信息，帮助你做出更好的决策。
        
```

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文中提出将中国燃煤电厂的CEMS观测与日尺度模型相结合，利用CEMS数据对模型进行增强，能够提升排放清单的时空表现，并计划将该框架扩展至水泥、钢铁等行业，实现日尺度多部门排放数据融合。,理由是提供了日尺度排放数据获取与融合的方法论，直接关联到提升区域空气质量模型的时效性，是后续多行业日尺度排放库构建的技术路线。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CEMS', 'daily emission inventory', 'data fusion', 'multisector emissions', 'China']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Despite the limitations, our study offers a framework to apply emission measurements from CEMS to improving the temporal representation of emission inventories. Insight obtained from this work could be extended to other sectors (e.g., cement, iron, and steel). In the future, we expect to develop a multisector dataset at the daily scale via data fusion to facilitate atmospheric research and clean air policy formation in China.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001081, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground station data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为内容与 chunk_000951 完全相同，未提供额外信息。,理由是重复条目，信息冗余，无需保留。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In this study, we use the tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns from the OMI operational retrieval products (Level 2 and version 3) released by the NASA Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Service Center (GES DISC). The tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The figure displays the location and setup of air pollution monitoring sites within East Yan'an Road Tunnel, Shanghai. It includes schematic representations of the tunnel and monitoring locations. The schematic provides spatial context for the air quality monitoring study, highlighting the strategic placement of sensors to capture key pollutants from vehicle emissions in a high-traffic urban tunnel."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001083, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': '3D vertical profile heatmap of pollutant concentrations'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该段落描述了使用 CMAQ DDM-3D（版本 5.2）在 CONUS 区域以 12 km 网格（459×299）进行逆向建模的配置，包括 27 层垂直分层、碳键（CB6r3）气相机制和 AERO6 气溶胶机制，以及基于 HCMAQ 的动态化学边界条件。,理由是提供了高分辨率（12 km）美国大陆逆向排放估算的关键模型细节，且注明了使用的文献与数据来源，适合作为后续深入分析模型不确定性或对比其他逆模型的切入点。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CMAQ DDM-3D', 'inverse modeling', '12 km grid', 'CB6r3', 'AERO6', 'HCMAQ', 'boundary conditions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

Similar increasing trends are observed for SO₂ and NOₓ, indicating vehicle‑emission buildup and aerodynamic mixing.,理由是Provides quantitative, distance‑dependent emission trends and clearly defines mixing vs. accumulation zones; includes paper ID for deeper follow‑up, making it valuable for mechanistic modeling of vehicular emissions.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CO2', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'mixing zone', 'accumulation zone', 'tunnel emissions', 'distance profile']。

The tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图9给出2010年7月15日至12月31日的日均AOD（OM+BC）时间序列，分别展示全球及五大燃烧区的观测、标准模型和增强模型（乘以3.4）。增强模型在日间波动和年周期上更好地拟合观测，提升了对气溶胶负荷的预报能力，可用于提前四天的空气质量预警。,理由是提供了模型时间演化的定量评估，展示了增强因子在日尺度预测中的优势，是进一步细化模型参数或进行多参数拟合研究的关键线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['time series', 'daily AOD', 'model validation', 'enhancement factor', 'air quality forecasting']。

证据节点ID: chunk_004087, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The passage quantifies uncertainties of industrial BC, CO and OC emission ratios using 10,000 Monte‑Carlo simulations, reporting 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., BC/CO ratio 0.0033–0.0133) and identifies industrial CO and BC emissions as the biggest contributors to variance (36 % and 25 % respectively) for the primary BC/CO ratio, and industrial OC, fugitive OC and BC as top contributors for OC/BC uncertainty.,理由是Provides concrete uncertainty metrics, variance contributions, and a clear link between industrial sources and bottom‑up emission ratio uncertainty – essential for deep‑dive analysis.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'BC/CO emission ratio', 'OC/BC emission ratio', 'industrial emissions uncertainty', 'variance contribution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of "top-down" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\\%$  and  $25\\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\\%$ ,  $23\\%$ , and  $20\\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_000483, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'machine learning visual analytics for multi‑pollutant air quality data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.,理由是Explains the temporal scope of the dataset and the rationale for excluding 2020 observations, which is important for understanding the policy impact assessment but does not add new methodological detail.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['policy evaluation', 'clean‑coal technology', 'AQI', 'deep learning prediction', 'temporal coverage']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'one-third of cities. Due to the shutdown of industrial activities and traffic volume, an obvious decline in primary air pollutants was observed in most Chinese cities in 2020 (Liu et al., 2020; Yuan et al., 2021). This will undoubtedly cause high uncertainty while investigating the effect of CCTPs on air quality. Therefore, the following data is only extracted from 2013 to 2019, and the AQI in 2020 is predicted through a deep learning network. Subsequently, the investigated data covers 8 years before and after the policy node, namely from 2013 to 2020, which is adequate for policy evaluation (Yu et al., 2021). In the following, air quality and meteorological data are obtained via a web crawler.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/fa4e3fc1-fa8a-45bf-892c-02fa70317f3a/8ac0615fcbf8ec3d41b8df37e5a1679b0309fb9401e526ead27a5370efba3d05.jpg)  \nFigure 12. 证据节点ID: chunk_000876, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground station data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该段描述了用于莫斯科等站点的直接日照测量系统（340–1020 nm），包括云过滤和对AOD及Ångström指数的计算方法，报告了可见光波段AOD不确定度≤0.01，紫外波段≤0.02。,理由是提供了AOD观测仪器与精度信息，可作为校准或验证模型AOD输出的参考，但缺乏直接的研究结论或新颖方法，价值偏向背景信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['aerosol optical depth', 'angstrom exponent', 'spectral measurements', 'cloud screening']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'wide network (Holben et al., 2001). In addition to the standard cloud-screening procedure a special cloud filter on the base of hourly cloud observations is used for Moscow data (Uliumdzhieva et al., 2005). Direct sun measurements are made with a  $1.2^{\\circ}$  full field of view collimator at 340, 380, 440, 500, 675, 870, 940 and  $1020\\mathrm{nm}$  every  $15\\mathrm{min}$  during daytime. The direct sun measurements (excluding the  $940\\mathrm{nm}$  channel, which is used to estimate the total water content) are used to compute the aerosol optical depth (AOD) and the Ångstrom exponent. The uncertainty of AOD measurements with level 2 processing does not exceed 0.01 in the visible range and 0.02 in the UV spectral range. We use level 2 data for Moscow, Minsk and Sevastopol and Bucarest,'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

For air pollutants, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations between observations and three simulated cases averaged'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX 亚洲排放清单的不确定性主要来源于底层清单的缺乏完整活动信息。文中指出，SO₂、NOₓ、CO₂ 等大规模燃烧源的排放不确定性相对较小，而 CO、NMVOC、碳质气溶胶等小规模散点源不确定性较大，并列举了基于误差传播或 Monte Carlo 方法的不确定性区间，可作为评估亚洲排放不确定性的参考。,理由是提供了排放不确定性的定量评估框架和特定物种的差异信息，可指导后续对亚洲排放清单的深入比较与不确定性传播分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX inventory', 'emission uncertainty', 'Monte Carlo', 'error propagation', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'NMVOC', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003990, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过 10,000 次 Monte Carlo 采样，对中国工业部门的 BC/CO 与 OC/BC 排放比率进行不确定性评估，得到 95% 置信区间分别为 0.0033–0.0133（BC/CO）和 0.79–2.92（OC/BC），并指出工业 CO 与 BC 排放对 BC/CO 比率不确定性的贡献最大（分别为 36% 与 25%），工业 OC、逸散 OC 与工业 BC 对 OC/BC 比率贡献亦显著，强调了工业排放在底层估算中的关键角色。,理由是提供了详细的定量不确定性结果和方差贡献分析，对理解中国工业排放的不确定性及其在区域空气质量模型中的影响具有重要价值，值得进一步追踪原始数据和模型实现。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo', 'BC/CO ratio', 'OC/BC ratio', 'industrial emissions', 'uncertainty analysis', 'top-down vs bottom-up', 'China emission inventory']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of "top-down" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\\%$  and  $25\\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\\%$ ,  $23\\%$ , and  $20\\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003782, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The abstract reports the first comprehensive Monte‑Carlo quantification of uncertainties for China's national bottom‑up inventory of SO₂, NOₓ, PM (various size classes), BC and OC in 2005, giving 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., NOₓ −13 % ~ 37 %, BC −25 % ~ 136 %) and highlights sector‑specific uncertainty sources such as cement production and boiler combustion.,理由是Summarises nationwide uncertainty ranges across key pollutants and sectors, directly addressing the research focus on emission inventory reliability.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['bottom‑up inventory', 'Monte Carlo uncertainty analysis', 'SO₂, NOₓ, PM₂.₅, BC, OC', 'sector‑specific emissions', 'confidence intervals']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002649, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.,理由是Provides contextual information about a widely used emission dataset, useful for background but lacks specific uncertainty quantification.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP v2.2', 'harmonised emission grids', 'global‑scale modelling', 'regional inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为A detailed Monte‑Carlo simulation framework is established to evaluate emission uncertainties from individual industrial plants, extending national‑scale uncertainty estimates and analyzing how data and methodological differences across multi‑scale inventories affect uncertainty.,理由是Provides methodological detail at plant, provincial, and national levels and references prior work (Zhao et al., 2011), offering a concrete pathway for further investigation into scale‑dependent uncertainty sources.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo framework', 'plant‑level emission uncertainty', 'multi‑scale inventory', 'industrial sources', 'Zhao et al. 2011']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'tracked and a detailed Monte-Carlo simulation framework was established, evaluating the uncertainties of emissions from individual plants. At national scale, the uncertainties of emissions of China and Jiangsu were also quantified following the method of our previous work (Zhao et al., 2011). The impacts of various data and methods between multi-scale inventories on the uncertainties of emission estimation are further analyzed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The CNN‑LSTM architecture combines a convolutional network for spatial feature extraction with an LSTM decoder for temporal forecasting, forming an encoder‑decoder pipeline that improves AQI prediction accuracy and mitigates training difficulties such as over‑fitting.,理由是Detailed description of a tailored model directly relevant to the study’s predictive task; the figure and accompanying text give actionable insight for reproducing or extending the methodology.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CNN-LSTM', 'encoder‑decoder', 'AQI prediction', 'model architecture', 'spatial‑temporal correlation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The figure illustrates the CNN-LSTM architecture used for air quality prediction, showcasing the model's encoder-decoder structure and workflow for feature extraction and forecasting. The tailored CNN-LSTM model is designed to effectively capture temporal-spatial correlations in air quality data, reducing training issues and improving prediction accuracy."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002808, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground station data'}。

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出卫星遥感的“自上而下”方法能够提供对 NO₂、SO₂、CO、HCHO 等重要痕量气体的列浓度信息，这些数据被用来约束并改进底层排放清单的评估。,理由是该段落阐明了利用卫星观测反演排放的核心思路，涉及具体的气体种类和方法论，是开展排放逆算研究的关键线索，建议进一步追踪原文及其引用的具体实验或数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Top‑down approach', 'Satellite remote sensing', 'NO₂ column', 'SO₂ column', 'CO column', 'HCHO column', 'Emission inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A recent remarkable development in satellite-based remote sensing instruments, or the so-called top-down approach, provides additional constraints to evaluate and improve the existing understanding of emission inventories (Martin, 2008; Streets et al., 2013). Tropospheric column densities of important trace gases, such as  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , CO, and HCHO, derived from satellite instruments generate an abundance of useful information on the emission sources of'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003905, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Presents a multi‑scale (national, provincial, city) Monte‑Carlo uncertainty analysis for industrial emissions in 2012, reporting 95 % confidence intervals for each pollutant (e.g., SO₂ −17 % ~ 37 %, PM₂.5 −32 % ~ 92 %) and identifies emission factors as the primary source of uncertainty, with notable reductions only for SO₂ at finer scales.,理由是Delivers detailed quantitative uncertainty ranges across scales and highlights the dominant role of emission‑factor uncertainty, valuable for targeted follow‑up studies.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['multi‑scale uncertainty analysis', 'industrial emission factors', 'province‑level inventory', 'city‑level inventory', 'Monte Carlo 95\u202f% CI']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_000859, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground station data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文中描述了 2010 年 7 月 15 日至 12 月 31 日期间，区域平均 550 nm 波长下黑碳（BC）和有机碳（OC）气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）的数值以及模型与分析结果的比率。,理由是提供了具体的 AOD 量化信息，可用于评估模型对黑碳和有机碳排放的再现能力，虽未直接给出数值但指向一张重要表格，值得保留作进一步数据抽取。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Aerosol Optical Depth', 'Black Carbon', 'Organic Matter', 'Fire Radiative Power', 'Model Validation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Table 6. Regional average sums of the aerosol optical depths at  $550\\mathrm{nm}$  of black carbon and organic matter during 15 July-31 December 2010 in the analysis and the model. The ratio of the two values is also given.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  grid resolution). It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_004002, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 2, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Duplicate of chunk_003905; repeats the same multi‑scale Monte‑Carlo uncertainty results for industrial emissions.,理由是Exact duplication of a higher‑priority entry provides no additional information; retaining it would be redundant.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002652, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': '3D vertical profile heatmap of pollutant concentrations'}。

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2 提供了 2008 与 2010 年的区域与全球排放网格图，具备高空间（0.1°×0.1°）和时间分辨率，适合作为全球基准排放清单，支持跨尺度政策情景分析。,理由是该段落概述了 HTAP_v2.2 数据集的整体价值，属于背景信息，对后续使用该清单进行模型输入有帮助，但未提供具体数据或新颖洞见。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'global emission inventory', '0.1°×0.1° grid', 'baseline scenario']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The HTAP_v2.2 air pollutant grid maps are considered to combine latest available regional information within a complete global data set. The disaggregation by sectors, high spatial and temporal resolution and detailed information on the data sources and references used will provide the user the required transparency. Because HTAP_v2.2 contains primarily official and/or widely used regional emission grid maps, it can be recommended as a global baseline emission inventory, which is regionally accepted as a reference and from which different scenarios assessing emission reduction policies at a global scale could start.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000953, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': '3D vertical profile heatmap of pollutant concentrations'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The passage details the CMAQ DDM‑3D inverse modeling framework applied over the CONUS with a 12 km grid (459 × 299 points) and 27 vertical layers, using CB6r3 gas‑phase and AERO6 aerosol mechanisms to derive sensitivities of NOₓ and VOC emissions from satellite observations.,理由是Provides a clear methodological description of a high‑resolution inverse modeling system that can be referenced for similar air‑quality inversion studies.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CMAQ', 'DDM‑3D', 'inverse modeling', 'NOx', 'VOC', 'satellite inversion', '12\u202fkm grid']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The metadata includes a paper identifier and clear functional roles, indicating high trustworthiness.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'sectoral emissions', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'PM2.5', 'chemical transport model', 'emission inventory']。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In this study, we use the tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns from the OMI operational retrieval products (Level 2 and version 3) released by the NASA Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Service Center (GES DISC). The tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该段落描述了使用 CMAQ DDM-3D（版本 5.2）在 CONUS 区域以 12 km 网格（459×299）进行逆向建模的配置，包括 27 层垂直分层、碳键（CB6r3）气相机制和 AERO6 气溶胶机制，以及基于 HCMAQ 的动态化学边界条件。,理由是提供了高分辨率（12 km）美国大陆逆向排放估算的关键模型细节，且注明了使用的文献与数据来源，适合作为后续深入分析模型不确定性或对比其他逆模型的切入点。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CMAQ DDM-3D', 'inverse modeling', '12 km grid', 'CB6r3', 'AERO6', 'HCMAQ', 'boundary conditions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图9给出2010年7月15日至12月31日的日均AOD（OM+BC）时间序列，分别展示全球及五大燃烧区的观测、标准模型和增强模型（乘以3.4）。增强模型在日间波动和年周期上更好地拟合观测，提升了对气溶胶负荷的预报能力，可用于提前四天的空气质量预警。,理由是提供了模型时间演化的定量评估，展示了增强因子在日尺度预测中的优势，是进一步细化模型参数或进行多参数拟合研究的关键线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['time series', 'daily AOD', 'model validation', 'enhancement factor', 'air quality forecasting']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The figure shows daily average aerosol optical depths of black carbon and organic matter globally and across five biomass burning regions, comparing analysis, model, and enhanced model results. The enhanced model better fits the analysis than the standard model, improving the forecast of aerosol loads for air quality warnings. It confirms the model's capability in capturing day-to-day variability and annual cycles."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None
