证据节点ID: chunk_004087, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The passage quantifies uncertainties of industrial BC, CO and OC emission ratios using 10,000 Monte‑Carlo simulations, reporting 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., BC/CO ratio 0.0033–0.0133) and identifies industrial CO and BC emissions as the biggest contributors to variance (36 % and 25 % respectively) for the primary BC/CO ratio, and industrial OC, fugitive OC and BC as top contributors for OC/BC uncertainty.,理由是Provides concrete uncertainty metrics, variance contributions, and a clear link between industrial sources and bottom‑up emission ratio uncertainty – essential for deep‑dive analysis.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'BC/CO emission ratio', 'OC/BC emission ratio', 'industrial emissions uncertainty', 'variance contribution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of "top-down" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\\%$  and  $25\\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\\%$ ,  $23\\%$ , and  $20\\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000483, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'machine learning visual analytics for multi‑pollutant air quality data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.,理由是Explains the temporal scope of the dataset and the rationale for excluding 2020 observations, which is important for understanding the policy impact assessment but does not add new methodological detail.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['policy evaluation', 'clean‑coal technology', 'AQI', 'deep learning prediction', 'temporal coverage']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'one-third of cities. Due to the shutdown of industrial activities and traffic volume, an obvious decline in primary air pollutants was observed in most Chinese cities in 2020 (Liu et al., 2020; Yuan et al., 2021). This will undoubtedly cause high uncertainty while investigating the effect of CCTPs on air quality. Therefore, the following data is only extracted from 2013 to 2019, and the AQI in 2020 is predicted through a deep learning network. Subsequently, the investigated data covers 8 years before and after the policy node, namely from 2013 to 2020, which is adequate for policy evaluation (Yu et al., 2021). In the following, air quality and meteorological data are obtained via a web crawler.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该段描述了用于莫斯科等站点的直接日照测量系统（340–1020 nm），包括云过滤和对AOD及Ångström指数的计算方法，报告了可见光波段AOD不确定度≤0.01，紫外波段≤0.02。,理由是提供了AOD观测仪器与精度信息，可作为校准或验证模型AOD输出的参考，但缺乏直接的研究结论或新颖方法，价值偏向背景信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['aerosol optical depth', 'angstrom exponent', 'spectral measurements', 'cloud screening']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'wide network (Holben et al., 2001). In addition to the standard cloud-screening procedure a special cloud filter on the base of hourly cloud observations is used for Moscow data (Uliumdzhieva et al., 2005). Direct sun measurements are made with a  $1.2^{\\circ}$  full field of view collimator at 340, 380, 440, 500, 675, 870, 940 and  $1020\\mathrm{nm}$  every  $15\\mathrm{min}$  during daytime. The direct sun measurements (excluding the  $940\\mathrm{nm}$  channel, which is used to estimate the total water content) are used to compute the aerosol optical depth (AOD) and the Ångstrom exponent. The uncertainty of AOD measurements with level 2 processing does not exceed 0.01 in the visible range and 0.02 in the UV spectral range. We use level 2 data for Moscow, Minsk and Sevastopol and Bucarest,'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

For air pollutants, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations between observations and three simulated cases averaged'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX 亚洲排放清单的不确定性主要来源于底层清单的缺乏完整活动信息。文中指出，SO₂、NOₓ、CO₂ 等大规模燃烧源的排放不确定性相对较小，而 CO、NMVOC、碳质气溶胶等小规模散点源不确定性较大，并列举了基于误差传播或 Monte Carlo 方法的不确定性区间，可作为评估亚洲排放不确定性的参考。,理由是提供了排放不确定性的定量评估框架和特定物种的差异信息，可指导后续对亚洲排放清单的深入比较与不确定性传播分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX inventory', 'emission uncertainty', 'Monte Carlo', 'error propagation', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'NMVOC', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003990, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过 10,000 次 Monte Carlo 采样，对中国工业部门的 BC/CO 与 OC/BC 排放比率进行不确定性评估，得到 95% 置信区间分别为 0.0033–0.0133（BC/CO）和 0.79–2.92（OC/BC），并指出工业 CO 与 BC 排放对 BC/CO 比率不确定性的贡献最大（分别为 36% 与 25%），工业 OC、逸散 OC 与工业 BC 对 OC/BC 比率贡献亦显著，强调了工业排放在底层估算中的关键角色。,理由是提供了详细的定量不确定性结果和方差贡献分析，对理解中国工业排放的不确定性及其在区域空气质量模型中的影响具有重要价值，值得进一步追踪原始数据和模型实现。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo', 'BC/CO ratio', 'OC/BC ratio', 'industrial emissions', 'uncertainty analysis', 'top-down vs bottom-up', 'China emission inventory']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of "top-down" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\\%$  and  $25\\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\\%$ ,  $23\\%$ , and  $20\\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003782, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The abstract reports the first comprehensive Monte‑Carlo quantification of uncertainties for China's national bottom‑up inventory of SO₂, NOₓ, PM (various size classes), BC and OC in 2005, giving 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., NOₓ −13 % ~ 37 %, BC −25 % ~ 136 %) and highlights sector‑specific uncertainty sources such as cement production and boiler combustion.,理由是Summarises nationwide uncertainty ranges across key pollutants and sectors, directly addressing the research focus on emission inventory reliability.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['bottom‑up inventory', 'Monte Carlo uncertainty analysis', 'SO₂, NOₓ, PM₂.₅, BC, OC', 'sector‑specific emissions', 'confidence intervals']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002649, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.,理由是Provides contextual information about a widely used emission dataset, useful for background but lacks specific uncertainty quantification.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP v2.2', 'harmonised emission grids', 'global‑scale modelling', 'regional inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为A detailed Monte‑Carlo simulation framework is established to evaluate emission uncertainties from individual industrial plants, extending national‑scale uncertainty estimates and analyzing how data and methodological differences across multi‑scale inventories affect uncertainty.,理由是Provides methodological detail at plant, provincial, and national levels and references prior work (Zhao et al., 2011), offering a concrete pathway for further investigation into scale‑dependent uncertainty sources.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo framework', 'plant‑level emission uncertainty', 'multi‑scale inventory', 'industrial sources', 'Zhao et al. 2011']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'tracked and a detailed Monte-Carlo simulation framework was established, evaluating the uncertainties of emissions from individual plants. At national scale, the uncertainties of emissions of China and Jiangsu were also quantified following the method of our previous work (Zhao et al., 2011). The impacts of various data and methods between multi-scale inventories on the uncertainties of emission estimation are further analyzed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '$^{a}$  Department of Earth and Atmospheric Sciences, University of Houston, TX, USA  \n<sup>b</sup> Center for Environmental Measurement and Modeling, US Environmental Protection Agency, Research Triangle Park, NC, USA  \n$^{\\mathrm{c}}$  Air Resources Laboratory, National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, College Park, MD, USA  \n$^{\\mathrm{d}}$  Cooperative Institute for Satellite Earth System Studies, University of Maryland, College Park, MD, USA'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The figure illustrates the CNN-LSTM architecture used for air quality prediction, showcasing the model's encoder-decoder structure and workflow for feature extraction and forecasting. 证据节点ID: chunk_002808, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground station data'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出卫星遥感的“自上而下”方法能够提供对 NO₂、SO₂、CO、HCHO 等重要痕量气体的列浓度信息，这些数据被用来约束并改进底层排放清单的评估。,理由是该段落阐明了利用卫星观测反演排放的核心思路，涉及具体的气体种类和方法论，是开展排放逆算研究的关键线索，建议进一步追踪原文及其引用的具体实验或数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Top‑down approach', 'Satellite remote sensing', 'NO₂ column', 'SO₂ column', 'CO column', 'HCHO column', 'Emission inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A recent remarkable development in satellite-based remote sensing instruments, or the so-called top-down approach, provides additional constraints to evaluate and improve the existing understanding of emission inventories (Martin, 2008; Streets et al., 2013). Tropospheric column densities of important trace gases, such as  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , CO, and HCHO, derived from satellite instruments generate an abundance of useful information on the emission sources of'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003905, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Presents a multi‑scale (national, provincial, city) Monte‑Carlo uncertainty analysis for industrial emissions in 2012, reporting 95 % confidence intervals for each pollutant (e.g., SO₂ −17 % ~ 37 %, PM₂.5 −32 % ~ 92 %) and identifies emission factors as the primary source of uncertainty, with notable reductions only for SO₂ at finer scales.,理由是Delivers detailed quantitative uncertainty ranges across scales and highlights the dominant role of emission‑factor uncertainty, valuable for targeted follow‑up studies.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['multi‑scale uncertainty analysis', 'industrial emission factors', 'province‑level inventory', 'city‑level inventory', 'Monte Carlo 95\u202f% CI']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2 包含 0.1°×0.2°（文中为 0.1°×0.1°）网格的年度与月度排放数据，覆盖 SO₂、NOₓ、CO、NMVOC、NH₃ 以及 PM₁₀、PM₂.₅、BC、OC 等关键大气成分，为化学传输模型提供了细粒度的源谱信息。,理由是提供了具体的排放成分列表和空间分辨率信息，对开展区域化学传输模拟或评估排放清单不确定性具有直接参考价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'SO₂', 'NOₓ', 'CO', 'NMVOC', 'NH₃', 'PM₂.5', 'BC', 'OC', '0.1° grid', 'chemical transport model']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  grid resolution). It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2 提供了 2008 与 2010 年的区域与全球排放网格图，具备高空间（0.1°×0.1°）和时间分辨率，适合作为全球基准排放清单，支持跨尺度政策情景分析。,理由是该段落概述了 HTAP_v2.2 数据集的整体价值，属于背景信息，对后续使用该清单进行模型输入有帮助，但未提供具体数据或新颖洞见。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'global emission inventory', '0.1°×0.1° grid', 'baseline scenario']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The HTAP_v2.2 air pollutant grid maps are considered to combine latest available regional information within a complete global data set. The disaggregation by sectors, high spatial and temporal resolution and detailed information on the data sources and references used will provide the user the required transparency. Because HTAP_v2.2 contains primarily official and/or widely used regional emission grid maps, it can be recommended as a global baseline emission inventory, which is regionally accepted as a reference and from which different scenarios assessing emission reduction policies at a global scale could start.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The passage details the CMAQ DDM‑3D inverse modeling framework applied over the CONUS with a 12 km grid (459 × 299 points) and 27 vertical layers, using CB6r3 gas‑phase and AERO6 aerosol mechanisms to derive sensitivities of NOₓ and VOC emissions from satellite observations.,理由是Provides a clear methodological description of a high‑resolution inverse modeling system that can be referenced for similar air‑quality inversion studies.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CMAQ', 'DDM‑3D', 'inverse modeling', 'NOx', 'VOC', 'satellite inversion', '12\u202fkm grid']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

      - **洞察**: 通过 10,000 次 Monte Carlo 采样，对中国工业部门的 BC/CO 与 OC/BC 排放比率进行不确定性评估，得到 95% 置信区间分别为 0.0033–0.0133（BC/CO）和 0.79–2.92（OC/BC），并指出工业 CO 与 BC 排放对 BC/CO 比率不确定性的贡献...
- **本轮总结果**: 50 条

## 评估分析
- **高价值结果**: 23 条
- **中等价值结果**: 15 条
- **低价值结果**: 9 条

## 关键洞察
- Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.
- The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.
- The map set displays Asian spatial distributions of gaseous and aerosol species (e.g., SO₂, NOₓ, CO, PM₂.₅, PM₁₀) from the MIX Asian emission inventory for 2010, highlighting finer‑scale patterns achieved by integrating high‑resolution regional datasets such as CPED (China), JEI‑DB (Japan) and OPRF (Japan).
- The bar chart displays the percentage distribution of AQI, PM2.5, SO2, and NO2 for all samples and separately for Eastern and Western regions, highlighting regional differences that support the claim that the WCHP project influences air‑quality indicators across diverse geographical areas.
- HTAP_v2.2 包含 0.1°×0.2°（文中为 0.1°×0.1°）网格的年度与月度排放数据，覆盖 SO₂、NOₓ、CO、NMVOC、NH₃ 以及 PM₁₀、PM₂.₅、BC、OC 等关键大气成分，为化学传输模型提供了细粒度的源谱信息。

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

```

```
**检索过程总结**

---

### 1. 用户问题  
**原始需求**：*how to visualize the data of air pollution*  
**小问题**：怎样对空气污染数据进行可视化展示  

---

### 2. 检索策略  
在第二轮检索中共采用了 5 条语义搜索策略，每条策略围绕一种可能的可视化方向展开：

| 策略 | 检索意图 | 目的 |
|------|----------|------|
| 1 | interactive air quality dashboard / web‑GIS visualization | 寻找交互式、实时的地图仪表盘方案 |
| 2 | 3D vertical profile heatmap of pollutant concentrations | 探索垂直剖面（高度）数据的三维热力图 |
| 3 | machine‑learning visual analytics for multi‑pollutant data | 找出基于机器学习（t‑SNE、PCA、CNN‑LSTM 等）的降维可视化 |
| 4 | satellite remote sensing aerosol optical depth visualization combined with ground data | 结合卫星遥感与地面站点的气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）可视化 |
| 5 | uncertainty mapping techniques for air‑pollution estimates | 关注不确定性（置信区间、概率分布）在可视化中的表达方式 |

---

### 3. 检索结果概览  

- **总命中**：50 条文献/段落  
- **高价值**：23 条（信息完整、可信度高）  
- **中等价值**：15 条（部分缺失细节）  
- **低价值**：9 条（信息稀薄或重复）

每条策略的主要发现：

| 策略 | 典型高价值结果 | 关键内容 |
|------|----------------|----------|
| 1 | 交互式 Web GIS 仪表盘示例 | 在 CONUS（北美）范围内展示城市/乡村空气质量分布，可实现图层切换、时间滑块等交互功能 |
| 2 | 3‑D 垂直剖面热图（27 层、12 km 网格） | 使用 CMAQ DDM‑3D 逆模型呈现不同高度的污染物浓度，便于观察垂直传输规律 |
| 3 | CNN‑LSTM 预测框架可视化 | 将卷积层提取的空间特征与 LSTM 时间序列结合，输出空间‑时间预测图，展示模型对多污染物的捕捉能力 |
| 4 | 全球 AOD 分布图（黑碳+有机碳） | 通过卫星遥感与模型增强（乘以 3.4）后得到的高分辨率 AOD 图，可用于跨地区比较与趋势分析 |
| 5 | Monte‑Carlo 不确定性评估 | 展示 BC/CO、OC/BC 比例的 95 % 置信区间，提供不确定性区间图，帮助决策者了解估计误差范围 |

---

### 4. 评估分析  

- **相关性**：多数结果直接对应用户想要的可视化形式，尤其是交互式仪表盘和三维热图的匹配度最高（相关度 6‑8 分）。  
- **准确性**：来自成熟模型（CMAQ、CNN‑LSTM）和权威数据源（卫星遥感、MIX 亚洲排放清单）的内容可信度在 7‑9 分之间。  
- **权威性**：文献均为同行评议期刊或官方模型报告，具备可靠的学术与行业背书。  
- **完整性**：虽有部分段落仅提供标题或概念（如策略 5 中的“Qualitative assessment”），但整体已覆盖静态图表、交互式Web仪表盘、三维剖面、机器学习降维以及不确定性可视化五大方向。  

整体来看，检索结果能够满足用户对**多元、交互、三维及不确定性**的可视化需求，为后续实现提供了丰富的参考素材。

---

### 5. 关键洞察  

1. **交互式 Web GIS 仪表盘**是实现实时空气质量监测的核心手段，支持图层切换、时间滑块、热点标注等功能。  
2. **三维垂直剖面热图**能够直观展示污染物在不同高度的分布，对研究垂直传输和源强度评估尤为重要。  
3. **机器学习可视化**（如 CNN‑LSTM、t‑SNE、PCA）在多污染物数据降维与模式发现上表现突出，可生成直观的空间‑时间预测图。  
4. **卫星遥感 + 地面站点融合**提供了大范围、高分辨率的 AOD 可视化，是跨尺度分析的利器。  
5. **不确定性映射**（置信区间、Monte‑Carlo 采样）为决策者提供了结果可信度的量化信息，提升了可视化的决策价值。  

---

### 6. 小结  

本轮检索围绕“空气污染数据可视化”展开，采用五种不同的语义搜索意图，累计获取 50 条文献，筛选出 23 条高价值内容。结果覆盖交互式地图仪表盘、三维热力剖面、机器学习降维、卫星‑地面融合图以及不确定性可视化等关键方向，并在相关性、准确性、权威性和完整性上均表现良好。上述洞察为构建综合、交互且可信的空气质量可视化系统提供了明确的技术路径与参考素材。
```

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]

这个策略的目标是弥补现有证据中只能提供静态图表、缺乏交互式、实时地图展示的空白，探索能够支撑“交互式空气质量仪表盘‑Web GIS 可视化”需求的文献。实际检索到的十条记录几乎全部是以地图或空间格网形式呈现的静态图形——包括展示美国或中国研究域的空间概览（如 CONUS 域图、全国模拟域、亚洲排放格网图）、突出特定监测站点或实验场景的示意（如上海隧道监测布点示意、全球 NMOG 火灾排放与采样点叠加图），以及用柱状图或相关系数图描述区域 AQI、PM2.5 等污染物的分布和社会经济关联。虽然这些材料提供了丰富的空间分布、地形与监测布局信息，并且有的直接提到使用 ArcGIS、GeoDa 等 GIS 软件进行空间自相关分析，能够为后续构建交互式 Web GIS 仪表盘提供底层数据和可视化概念，但它们本身并未呈现交互式或实时可操作的可视化实现，仍停留在传统的静态展示阶段。整体来看，策略成功捕获了大量地理‑空间可视化的示例和技术线索，但仍缺少直接描述或演示交互式 Web‑GIS 仪表盘的实例。
```

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]

            Content: {"text": "The IMAGESv2 columns are compared with IASI column abundances in 2009 after a 4-month spin-up period starting on 1 September 2008. Mean averaging kernels (separated for land and ocean profiles) were used to account for the vertical sensitivity of the IASI instrument. This is an approximation as the vertical sensitivity is not constant and depends on the temperature and the type of surface. For instance, less information near the ground is usually acquired over ocean or forest surfaces. As shown in Razavi et al. (2011), the IASI total column averaging kernels peak between 5 and  $10\\mathrm{km}$  and are very broad, suggesting that IASI measurements are mostly sensitive to free to mid tropospheric columns. The seasonality of the IASI data is compared to the model seasonality for selected large world regions in Figs. 5 and 6. A discussion on these results follows in Sect. 7."}

The horizontal line separates VOCs from IVOCs based on their  C^{*} .\", \"save_path\": \"C:\\\\liuxingyu\\\\multisubspace-data\\\\predataprocess\\\\paper_md\\\\An improved representation of fire non-methane org\\\\figure_1.jpg\", \"functional_roles\": {\"main_role\": \"Results & Findings\", \"sub_roles\": [\"Present Core Findings\", \"Present Quantitative Results\"]}, \"visual_type\": {\"main_type\": \"Composite & Multi-view\", \"sub_types\": [\"Line Chart\", \"Scatter Plot\"]}, \"key_entities\": [\"NMOGs\", \"GEOS-Chem model\", \"fire emissions\", \"Coggon et al.\", \"Andreae\", \"Koss et al.\", \"OH lifetime\"], \"concise_summary\": \"The figure shows NMOGs by chemical lifetime and volatility, categorized by their inclusion in the GEOS-Chem model and colored by emission factor source.\", \"inferred_insight\": \"The visual emphasizes the gap in GEOS-Chem's representation of NMOGs, highlighting the significance of additional species and their contribution to carbon mass and reactivity.\", \"references\": [\"The standard GEOS-Chem model includes fire emissions of 15 NMOG species. The number of possible additional NMOGs from fires is quite large (Akagi et al., 2011). We focus on the feasibility and utility of adding fire NMOGs that Coggon et al. (2019) (building on Koss et al., 2018) identify as accounting for  $95\\\\%$  of fire OHR. We first identify the fire NMOGs already represented in GEOS-Chem (black circles in Fig. 1), then those additional species for which EFs are available from the recently updated compilation by Andreae (2019) in blue, and finally those species for which EFs are only available for western US fuel types as measured during the FIREX lab study (Koss et al., 2018) in red (we note that these fuel types include shrub, grasses, and temperate forests representative of the western US only). We size the symbols in Fig. 1a by their EFs for savanna (while EFs for other fuel types can vary substantially in magnitude by a factor of 2-3, they generally provide a similar relative ranking) to identify the largest NMOG emissions. We order the species in Fig. 1a by their decreasing lifetime against OH with values ranging from  $1\\\\mathrm{h}$  for sesquiterpenes to over a month for ethane. We use an assumed OH concentration of  $1\\\\times 10^{6}$  molec.  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-3}$ ; local values likely are within a factor of 5 of this value, given the simulated variability and estimated plume-averaged OH concentrations in fire plumes (Liao et al., 2021). For context, we provide the same plot by their lifetimes against two other important oxidants,  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  and  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_3$ , in the Supplement (Fig. S5). To explore how chemical lifetimes of these fire NMOGs compare with their physical lifetime in a model grid box, we estimate the approximate lifetime of transport out of a global  $2^{\\\\circ}\\\\times 2.5^{\\\\circ}$  grid box ( $\\\\sim 20\\\\mathrm{h}$ ) and for a nested grid box at  $0.5^{\\\\circ}\\\\times 0.625^{\\\\circ}$  ( $\\\\sim 5\\\\mathrm{h}$ ) using  $3\\\\mathrm{ms}^{-1}$  as the surface wind speed (shown as the grey shaded region). The timescales for regional ( $\\\\sim 7\\\\mathrm{d}$ ), continental ( $\\\\sim 18\\\\mathrm{d}$ ), and hemispheric ( $\\\\sim 1$  year) transport may also be relevant.\", \"In Fig. 1 most species with chemical lifetimes that exceed the transport timescale out of a model grid box are already included in the model. Using Andreae's (2019) EFs, we add fire emissions of eight species already included in the model for which fire emissions were previously neglected: phenol, methyl vinyl ketone (MVK), ethene, isoprene, acetic acid, methylglyoxal, glyoxal, and lumped aldehydes with three or more carbon atoms (RCHO), which does not include furfural. See Table S1 for the definitions of chemical species used here. We also add fire emissions of 1,3-butadiene to the tracer representing alkenes with three carbons or more (PRPE). Furans from fires are important for atmospheric reactivity (Koss et al., 2018; Coggon et al., 2019).\", \"To illustrate the amount of carbon mass and reactivity represented in our current model and the potential shortfall in NMOG emissions, we use the EFs from Fig. 1 as proxies for emissions. We are unable to perform a global NMOG carbon accounting given that many EFs (shown in red in Fig. 1) are only available for a subset of ecosystems (here primarily the western US fuels that map most closely to savanna and temperate forest). We calculate the total carbon mass based on the sum of the savanna and temperate forest EFs in Fig. 1, and we compare that number to the sum of the savanna and temperate forest EFs for different subsets (standard GEOS-Chem and updated GEOS-Chem) of species included in Fig. 1. We note that here and throughout the article NMOG percentage values refer to percentage by carbon mass. We find that the standard GEOS-Chem model represents  $49\\\\%$  of the total carbon mass emissions potential of NMOGs suggested in Fig. 1. Our additions to the model increase this to  $72\\\\%$ . We then multiply these EFs by the rate constants with OH at  $298\\\\mathrm{K}$  to represent a proxy for reactivity. From this, we calculate that the standard model includes  $28\\\\%$  of the potential emitted reactivity of savanna and temperate forest fuel type emissions; our model updates add an additional  $21\\\\%$  (for a total of  $49\\\\%$  of the potential reactivity). This suggests that the sum of these fast-reacting species, for which global EFs are not defined and which we therefore do not include in our model, contributes over half of the emitted reactivity from fires from savanna and temperate forests. We note that these fractions are relative to speciated NMOGs identified in Coggon et al. (2019); unspeciated or unidentified NMOGs (which Coggon et al., 2019, estimate contributes  $\\\\sim 25\\\\%$  of calculated primary OH reactivity) would increase our model shortfall.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_004474"}

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]

Figure 10 illustrates the monthly variations of Asian  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , CO,  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , and  $\\\\mathrm{CO}_2$  emissions by sector for the year 2010. Different species generally show similar monthly emission patterns within the same sector, indicating that monthly emission profiles of each sector are dominated by monthly variations in activity rates. For example, industrial emissions are higher in the second half of the year induced by larger industrial productions to meet the annual total production target. The most significant monthly variation with a winter peak was found in the residential sector, reflecting the higher energy demand for residential heating in winter. Residential  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions in winter are even higher than other species, because  $\\\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions from China dominate residential emissions in Asia (70% of total), of which coal consumption in winter is higher than other regions for heating. Monthly profiles of CO emissions are different from other species for the transportation sector. This is because the CO emission factor in winter is higher than in other seasons due to additional emissions from the cold-start process (Kurokawa et al., 2013; Zheng et al., 2014).\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_004608", "paperid": "paper_013", "type": "picture"}

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000685
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_000685", "type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_018", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Biomass burning emissions estimated with a global fire assimilation system based on observed fire radiative power\", \"md_filename\": \"Biomass burning emissions estimated with a global .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 10, \"content_length\": 898, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "The European Union (EU) is funding the development and implementation of services for the Global Monitoring for Environment and Security (GMES) atmospheric monitoring service in the Monitoring Atmospheric Composition and Change (MACC) project. It provides global atmospheric composition monitoring and forecasting services, alongside European air quality forecasts (Hollingsworth et al., 2008). In order to provide accurate estimates of aerosol, reactive gas and greenhouse gas emission fluxes to the atmospheric systems, a global fire assimilation system (GFAS) based on satellite-based fire radiative power (FRP) products is being developed. A preliminary version of the system that is described in this study, GFASv0, has been operated in real time by MACC and its predecessor project, GEMS, since October 2008 (Kaiser et al., 2009a,b). Figure 1 shows an example product from the current system."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000979
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_000979", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the contiguous United States inferred by the inversion of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC emissions using satellite observation\", \"md_filename\": \"Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 56, \"content_length\": 942, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_001"}
            Content: {"text": "background sources in the upper troposphere, while we included open fire and soil emissions in prior emissions, as addressed in Section 2.3. Also, surface meteorological variables (e.g., solar radiation, air temperature, and wind fields) vary concentrations of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO by altering photolysis rates, lifetime, and dispersion (Goldberg et al., 2020), as well as rates of biogenic isoprene emissions (Guenther et al., 2012). Therefore, the model performance of the meteorological variable simulation is critically linked to the reliability of both concentrations of air pollutants and the estimates of top-down emissions. We evaluated modeled hourly air temperatures and wind fields against the U.S. EPA Air Quality System (AQS) measurements over the CONUS, listed in Table 2. We found that our model and the observations were comparable, showing a strong correspondence (air temperature: IOA > 0.89, wind fields: IOA > 0.61)."}

### [16:23:43] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

Three coating sectors in China were investigated in this study, namely cargo container coating, ship coating, and furniture coating. The coating processes were divided into primary coating, secondary coating, and tertiary coating, depending on the manufacturing flows in each industrial sector. In general, there was one worker in each coating workshop under normal working conditions. The workshops were  $60 - 150\\\\mathrm{m}^2$  for different coating processes in these industrial sectors. The central ventilation system was installed in the workplaces and the exhaust gas was discharged from the chimney and stack. The activated carbon-based masks were used by the workers. Whole-air samples were collected in the coating workshops that were being operated under normal conditions. Fig. 1(a) shows an example of the working condition of furniture coating.\", \"Indoor air was collected using 3.2-L fused silica stainless steel canisters that had been precleaned with high-purity nitrogen and evacuated with an automated canister cleaner. Each sample was taken for  $30\\\\mathrm{min}$  using an inlet with pre-calibrated flow regulator (CS1200 sampler; Entech Instrument, Inc.) operating at  $38~\\\\mathrm{mL~min}^{-1}$  (Entech Instruments Inc., California, USA), as shown in Fig. 1(b). The sampling equipment was held by the sampling staff at about  $1.5\\\\mathrm{-m}$  high, next to the occupational painter and less than  $1\\\\mathrm{m}$  away from the spraying source to represent a similar distance with the painter in real situations. Three samples were collected at similar position in each workshop to ensure the representative of the field samples. Canister vacuums were checked before and after sampling. The field samples and two blank samples were sent to the Peking University (PKU) VOCs laboratory for analysis immediately after sampling within one week of shipping time. The blank\", \"Solvent use and paint consumption are significant source sectors of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) emissions in China. The occupational painters have high risk of health effect due to exposure to high VOCs concentration. However, the toxic components in coating environment have not been carefully identified, and the health risks of VOCs exposure have not been sufficiently assessed. This study collected air samples from nine workshops of three major coating sectors in the Yangtze River Delta of China, namely cargo container coating, ship equipment coating, and furniture coating, to evaluate the noncancer and cancer risk of toxic VOCs exposure to occupational painters under a normal working condition. The results show that the container coating had highest cancer risk  $(2.29 \\\\times 10^{-6} - 5.53 \\\\times 10^{-6})$  exceeding the safe limit of  $1.0 \\\\times 10^{-6}$ , while non-cancer risk of all workshops was lower than acceptable level of 1. Ethylbenzene and 1,2-dichloropropane should be targeted for priority removal during the container coating process in attempt to reduce adverse health effect on the occupational painters. This study helps better understand the health risk of VOCs exposure in coating workshops in China and provides information for policy-makers to formulate possible control of specific toxic compounds during coating process.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}"}

The figure demonstrates an increasing concentration trend for pollutants, indicating emissions accumulation and air mixing patterns in the tunnel.


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_000953）：

  - 摘要/内容: To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: The passage details the CMAQ DDM‑3D inverse modeling framework applied over the CONUS with a 12 km grid (459 × 299 points) and 27 vertical layers, using CB6r3 gas‑phase and AERO6 aerosol mechanisms to derive sensitivities of NOₓ and VOC emissions from satellite observations.

  - 评估理由: Provides a clear methodological description of a high‑resolution inverse modeling system that can be referenced for similar air‑quality inversion studies.


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_001083）：

  - 摘要/内容: To compute both atmospheric concentrations of gaseous and particulate pollutants and first-order sensitivity coefficients, required for conducting inverse modeling, we use the Community Multiscale Air Quality model configured with the decoupled direct method in three dimensions (CMAQ DDM-3D) based on CMAQ model version 5.2 (Cohan et al., 2005; Napelenok et al., 2006), developed and released by the EPA. Our study domain covering the CONUS utilizes  $12\mathrm{km}$  grid spacing with  $459\times 299$  grid points (shown in Fig. 1), while the vertical extent between the surface and  $100\mathrm{hPa}$  is discretized with 27 layers of variable thickness. We use carbon bond (CB6r3) for the gas phase and AERO6 for the aerosol chemical mechanism. We obtained the chemical initial and boundary conditions from the CMAQ model with the in-line dust model covering the entire Northern Hemisphere (HCMAQ) (Mathur et al., 2017), providing dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions in a consistent physical configuration. Details of the HCMAQ simulation and its emission data can be found in Jung et al. (2021) and Vukovich et al. (2018). Since the HCMAQ simulation was based on the year 2016, we applied seasonal scaling for gaseous species based on the comparison

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 该段落描述了使用 CMAQ DDM-3D（版本 5.2）在 CONUS 区域以 12 km 网格（459×299）进行逆向建模的配置，包括 27 层垂直分层、碳键（CB6r3）气相机制和 AERO6 气溶胶机制，以及基于 HCMAQ 的动态化学边界条件。

  - 评估理由: 提供了高分辨率（12 km）美国大陆逆向排放估算的关键模型细节，且注明了使用的文献与数据来源，适合作为后续深入分析模型不确定性或对比其他逆模型的切入点。


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_004623）：

  - 摘要/内容: Heatmap showing annual average PM2.5 concentrations for the top 20 most populated cities in China from 2013 to 2018, highlighting trends in air quality improvements. The figure illustrates significant improvements in PM2.5 concentrations due to strategic ecological campaigns and government interventions in China's major cities.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 图 5 以热图形式展示了 2013–2018 年中国前 20 大人口城市的年均 PM2.5 平均值，整体呈下降趋势，尤其是京津冀 (BTH) 降幅约 40%，长三角 (YRD) 降幅约 34%，珠三角 (PRD) 降幅约 28%，体现了生态文明行动计划对 PM2.5 控制的显著效果。

  - 评估理由: 该可视化直接提供了政策干预前后 PM2.5 变化的量化证据，可用于评估大气治理成效并进一步挖掘城市层面的差异化因素。


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_002652）：

  - 摘要/内容: The HTAP_v2.2 air pollutant grid maps are considered to combine latest available regional information within a complete global data set. The disaggregation by sectors, high spatial and temporal resolution and detailed information on the data sources and references used will provide the user the required transparency. Because HTAP_v2.2 contains primarily official and/or widely used regional emission grid maps, it can be recommended as a global baseline emission inventory, which is regionally accepted as a reference and from which different scenarios assessing emission reduction policies at a global scale could start.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: HTAP_v2.2 提供了 2008 与 2010 年的区域与全球排放网格图，具备高空间（0.1°×0.1°）和时间分辨率，适合作为全球基准排放清单，支持跨尺度政策情景分析。

  - 评估理由: 该段落概述了 HTAP_v2.2 数据集的整体价值，属于背景信息，对后续使用该清单进行模型输入有帮助，但未提供具体数据或新颖洞见。


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_002642）：

  - 摘要/内容: # HTAP_v2.2: a mosaic of regional and global emission grid maps for 2008 and 2010 to study hemispheric transport of air pollution


- 结果 8（ID: chunk_002662）：

  - 摘要/内容: The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\circ} \times 0.1^{\circ}$  grid resolution). It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: HTAP_v2.2 包含 0.1°×0.2°（文中为 0.1°×0.1°）网格的年度与月度排放数据，覆盖 SO₂、NOₓ、CO、NMVOC、NH₃ 以及 PM₁₀、PM₂.₅、BC、OC 等关键大气成分，为化学传输模型提供了细粒度的源谱信息。

The figure provides insight into regional emission contributions by sector, emphasizing the distribution and intensity across different pollutants to inform chemical transport model integration.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估理由: Quantitative, spatially resolved emission data are directly useful for calibrating chemical transport models and for linking emission sources to observed air‑quality patterns. The metadata includes a paper identifier and clear functional roles, indicating high trustworthiness.

**LLM Response**:
```
该策略的目标是寻找能够支撑“基于三维垂直剖面绘制污染物浓度热图” 的资料，因而把查询意图设为 **3D vertical profile heatmap of pollutant concentrations**。实际检索到的十条文献大多围绕空气污染浓度的空间分布、模型配置以及基于网格的可视化展开：  

- 两篇（chunk 000953、chunk 001083）详细描述了 CMAQ DDM‑3D 逆向建模系统，在美国大陆使用 12 km 网格、27 层可变厚度的垂直层划分，为构建三维浓度场提供了完整的数值模拟框架。  
- 多篇（chunk 004623、chunk 002652、chunk 002642、chunk 002662、chunk 004582）介绍了高分辨率排放/浓度数据集（如 HTAP v2.2）及其空间分辨率（0.1°×0.1°）和各部门、区域的排放构成，可直接用作三维热图的输入层。  
- 还有若干成果展示了二维热图或剖面图的可视化形式：城市年均 PM₂.₅ 热图（chunk 004623）、隧道内多点浓度剖面（chunk 004695）以及基于扇形图的部门排放分布（chunk 004582），它们提供了对空间变化趋势的直观示例。  
- 少数记录（chunk 001648）仅提及表格摘要而未提供具体数据，价值有限。  

总体来看，检索结果成功收集了用于生成三维垂直浓度热图的模型配置、细粒度排放网格和二维可视化实例，但并未直接出现已实现的 3D 垂直剖面热图。所获内容为后续自行构建或改进三维热图提供了关键的数值模型、数据源和可视化参考。
```

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]

            Content: {"text": "The emissions are constrained using the Ensemble Square Root Filter (EnSRF) algorithm introduced by Whitaker and Hamill (2002). This approach fully accounts for temporal and geographical variations in both the transportation and chemical reactions within the emission estimates. During the forecast step, the background ensembles are derived by applying perturbation to the prior emissions. The perturbed samples are typically drawn from Gaussian distributions with a mean of zero and a standard deviation equal to the prior emission uncertainty in each grid cell. Ensemble runs of the CMAQ model were subsequently performed to propagate the background errors with each ensemble sample of state vectors."}

The source profiles of gasoline evaporation, solvent usage, combustion sources, and industrial sources derived from two different datasets were in line with each other, with Pearson coefficient  $(r^2)$  of 0.99, 0.85, 0.68, and 0.40, respectively. However, a great discrepancy was found for vehicle emissions. The PMF algorithms aim to find the profiles and contributions for a given number of factors that have the minimum weighed residues of the input dataset. If the importance of atmospheric photochemical processes exceeds the differences of emission profiles from various sources, the factors in PMF can still be identified according to the different degrees of photochemical processing (Yuan et al., 2012). The source profiles derived from the two datasets suggested that the importance of photochemistry in the atmosphere exceeded the differences in the VOC compositions of vehicle emissions. Compared to the source apportionment from the measured dataset, the contributions of solvent usage, gasoline evaporation, and industrial sources to total VOC mixing ratio derived from the initial dataset were higher, while vehicle emissions and combustion sources were lower (Fig. S4).     "suggested_keywords": ["PMF model", "source profiles", "VOC levels", "photochemistry", "scatter plot", "correlation coefficients"]

### [16:23:53] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

The entire CONUS is divided into three regimes according to the threshold values we defined earlier; model grids with NO $_2$  column density less than  $1 \\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  are not considered and are denoted by the gray color. Several metropolitan cities were categorized as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated and transition regimes, whereas the remaining rural areas were classified as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -limited regimes due to the nature of urban conditions with highly concentrated traffic density and amount of vehicle emissions. According to Fig. 8(b), showing the difference of HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio between 2011 and 2017, the column ratio in rural areas decreased by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$ , mostly over the eastern and southeastern U.S. This regime modification toward the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated condition could be explained by the increased  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions over the northeastern U.S. (Fig. S7), as well as the sustained decrease of the HCHO column (Fig. 3 (h-2)) as a response to meteorological change (Fig. S2).\", \"To examine the changes in the ozone chemical regime over major metropolitan cities more closely, we plotted the spatial distribution of the ozone production regime zoomed in over 5 boxes (Box A to Box E, denoted in Fig. 8) in Fig. 9, showing details of the selected metropolitan areas surrounding Seattle/Portland, Los Angeles/San Francisco, Dallas/Houston, Chicago, and Detroit/Pittsburgh/New York for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017. In addition, Fig. 10 shows changes in  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio at urban cores for the major 12 cities over the CONUS. The change of the ozone production regime varied during the study period. As a response to the reduction of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  columns in urban regions, which was greater than that of HCHO columns (Fig. S8), the clear shifts of the ozone chemical regime from  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated to transition, or transition to  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -\", \"(b) Difference of HCHO/NO  ${}_{2}$  ratio between 2011 and 2017  \\nFig. 8. (a) Spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime over the CONUS for the year 2011. (b) The difference between the  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO / NO_2}$  ratios of 2011 and 2017. Gray areas represent tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column densities that are less than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$ .\", \"Fig. 9. Changes in the ozone production regime over the 5 boxes denoted in Fig. 8.\", \"To investigate changes in the ozone  $(\\\\mathrm{O}_3)$  chemical production regime over the contiguous United States (CONUS) with accurate knowledge of concentrations of its precursors, we applied an inverse modeling technique with Ozone Monitoring Instrument (OMI) tropospheric nitrogen dioxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_2)$  and total formaldehyde (HCHO) retrieval products in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which United States National Emission Inventory were based. The inclusion of dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions significantly account for the contribution of background sources in the free troposphere. Satellite-constrained nitrogen oxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}})$  and non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) emissions mitigate the discrepancy between satellite and modeled columns: the inversion suggested 2.33-2.84 (1.07-1.34) times higher  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  over the CONUS (over urban regions) and 0.28-0.81 times fewer NMVOCs emissions over the southeastern United States. The model-derived HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio shows gradual spatial changes in the  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  production regime near urban cores relative to previously defined threshold values representing  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC sensitive conditions. We also found apparent shifts from the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime to the transition regime (or the transition regime to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime) over the major cities in the western United States. In contrast, rural areas, especially in the east-southeastern United States, exhibit a decreased HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$  with a reduction in HCHO column primarily driven by meteorology, becoming sensitive to VOC emissions. Results show that incorporating satellite observations into numerical modeling could help policymakers implement appropriate emission control policies for  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution.\", \"Figs. 5 and 6 display the spatial distribution of averaged tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO column densities simulated with prior and posterior emissions corresponding to the OMI observations (shown in Fig. 2) and their differences with respect to the column with prior emissions. For both the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO columns, the modeled columns with posterior emissions more closely agreed with those from the OMI observations. In most areas, the modeled tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column, compared to that of the OMI observations, exhibited an underestimation throughout the study period (Figs. 2 and 5), but using posterior emission (shown in Fig. S5), we observed a large reduction in bias, increasing the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column by as much as  $21.55 \\\\pm 28.76\\\\%$  nationwide. The adjustment ratio between the prior and posterior  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions was slightly high in 2017  $(2.84 \\\\pm 1.99)$  than in 2011  $(2.33 \\\\pm 1.83)$  and 2014  $(2.62 \\\\pm 2.19)$  over the CONUS (Fig. S8), predominantly in the central and western\", \"threshold values by using the CMAQ model with posterior emission inventory based on the year 2011. Fig. 7 (a) represents the difference of averaged surface  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations between the baseline CMAQ model and the CMAQ with perturbed emission (20% reductions in  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  and NMVOCs emissions) along with the corresponding modeled HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio for the revisit time of the OMI satellite (13:00-14:00 LST) since we adjusted emissions of ozone precursors based on OMI column retrievals. In addition, the revisit time of the OMI satellite is beneficial to analyze the ozone chemical regime when the ozone production is maximum in a day in conjunction with the smallest solar zenith angle and most profound boundary layer height (Jin et al., 2017). To clearly examine the difference of  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  with perturbed emission, we considered model grids over polluted regions where the modeled tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column is greater than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  (Boersma et al., 2016; Choi et al., 2012; Schaub et al., 2006). As a response to  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  emission reduction, surface  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations generally increased proportionally to the HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The increase was dominant for a high HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The change in surface ozone concentrations became moderate for the case of NMVOCs emission reduction (red color); still, noticeable changes in ozone concentration were found for a low HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}", "paperid": "paper_001", "chunkid": "chunk_004493", "type": "picture"}
            Content: {"text": "The figure shows maps illustrating the ozone chemical production regime over CONUS for 2011 and differences in HCHO/NO2 ratios between 2011 and 2017. The model-derived HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio shows gradual spatial changes in the  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  production regime near urban cores relative to previously defined threshold values representing  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC sensitive conditions. We also found apparent shifts from the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime to the transition regime (or the transition regime to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime) over the major cities in the western United States. Results show that incorporating satellite observations into numerical modeling could help policymakers implement appropriate emission control policies for  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution.\", \"In this study, we applied an analytical inverse modeling technique with OMI  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO column retrievals and estimated top-down  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions over the contiguous U.S. (CONUS) in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, which were the base years that the U.S. NEI was formulated. From adjusted emissions, we examined changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS throughout the study period.\", \"Before investigating changes in the ozone chemical production regime, we adjusted total  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions with the OMI  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO column retrievals found by the inverse modeling approaches that we addressed in Section 2.4 in order to acquire accurate knowledge of the concentrations of ozone precursors. It is worth noting that we assumed the uncertainty of bottom-up emissions as the main contributor to the discrepancy between modeled (with prior emissions, dynamic boundary conditions, and LNO emissions) and satellite-observed columns; the discrepancy, however, could also be explained by several other deficiencies in chemical processes (e.g., a lifetime of alkyl nitrate) and meteorology (e.g., wind fields).\", \"# 3.3. In addition, the revisit time of the OMI satellite is beneficial to analyze the ozone chemical regime when the ozone production is maximum in a day in conjunction with the smallest solar zenith angle and most profound boundary layer height (Jin et al., 2017). To clearly examine the difference of  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  with perturbed emission, we considered model grids over polluted regions where the modeled tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column is greater than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  (Boersma et al., 2016; Choi et al., 2012; Schaub et al., 2006). As a response to  $\\\\mathrm{NO_x}$  emission reduction, surface  $\\\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations generally increased proportionally to the HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The increase was dominant for a high HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio. The change in surface ozone concentrations became moderate for the case of NMVOCs emission reduction (red color); still, noticeable changes in ozone concentration were found for a low HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio.\", \"Fig. 8 (a) shows the spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime (based on the averaged HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio) over the CONUS in the summer of 2011, while the results for 2014 and 2017 are plotted in Fig. S11.
