According to Fig. 8(b), showing the difference of HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio between 2011 and 2017, the column ratio in rural areas decreased by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$ , mostly over the eastern and southeastern U.S. This regime modification toward the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated condition could be explained by the increased  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions over the northeastern U.S. (Fig. S7), as well as the sustained decrease of the HCHO column (Fig. 3 (h-2)) as a response to meteorological change (Fig. S2).\", \"(b) Difference of HCHO/NO  ${}_{2}$  ratio between 2011 and 2017  \\nFig. 8. (a) Spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime over the CONUS for the year 2011. (b) The difference between the  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO / NO_2}$  ratios of 2011 and 2017. Gray areas represent tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column densities that are less than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$ .\", \"limited were found partially over metropolitan areas (e.g., Seattle, Houston, and Pittsburgh) or completely even at urban cores (e.g., Houston, San Francisco, and Salt Lake City), especially from 2014 to 2017. By contrast, Los Angeles, New York, and Portland were the cities steadily remaining in the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime throughout the study period. Also, we observed the sudden expansions of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated conditions at the urban cores of Houston (in 2014) and Detroit (in 2017). In general, most cities in the eastern U.S., except Pittsburgh, tended to stay in the same regime to which they were in 2011 or even came back to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime compared to the cities in the western U.S. Many recent studies have reported the changes in ozone chemical regime over the major U.S. metropolitan areas toward  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime in general, but with a narrow range in the reported year when the regime change occurred, and cities still remained in  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited condition, which is related to the dataset, study period, and methodology of each study; Chang et al. (2016) showed that ozone formation in Boston, Pittsburgh, Philadelphia, and Washington has changed to  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited or transition regimes in 2007-2014, while New York City mostly stayed in the transition regime (2007-2009) and VOC-limited regime (2007-2009 and 2014). Jin et al. (2020) addressed that  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated condition is occurring only in Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York City by 2013-2016, and Koplitz et al. (2021) showed regime change toward  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited condition over most of the U.S., and a few cities such as New York City, Chicago, Minneapolis, San Francisco, and Los Angeles are still remained in  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime as in 2016.\", \"In this study, we examined changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which U.S. NEI data were based. To combine the benefits of both satellite retrievals and CTMs, we employed an inverse modeling technique with OMI tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO column retrievals to estimate  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions. To avoid misalignment of the emission adjustment, we applied dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions, resulting in better representation of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration in the upper atmosphere, confirmed by comparisons with measurements from the DISCOVER-AQ campaigns and two ozonesonde sites.\", \"Compared to OMI observations, the model with the top-down estimated  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions showed remarkably better performance for simulating tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns and alleviated the nationwide underestimation of the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column and the overestimation of the HCHO column appearing over the southeastern U. S. We then used the CMAQ model to determine the threshold values of the ozone production regime, which closely represented the ozone chemical conditions of this study:  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated (HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2 < 1.6$ ), a transition  $(1.6 < \\\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\\\mathrm{NO}_2 < 2.6)$ , and  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited (HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2 > 2.6$ ), which is slightly distinct from other studies by Chang et al. (2016), Choi et al. (2012), Duncan et al. (2010) and Jin et al. (2017). This is because the threshold value of the HCHO/  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio represents the unique ozone chemistry of the CTM depending upon several influencing factors such as study domain, chemical mechanism, and meteorological condition; therefore, the applicability of the threshold value in other\", \"direct-sun DOAS technique: Intercomparisons and application to OMI validation.             Content: {"text": "Figure 9 displays the ozone production regime changes in five metropolitan areas in the U.S. for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, using geospatial maps. The AMFs of both columns were adjusted based on the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO columns simulated in this study. The OMI tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  columns showed large values in cities with high population density and industrial activity, such as Seattle, Los Angeles, Houston, Chicago, and New York. During the study period, the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  columns exhibited a similar spatial distribution, but with a domain-wide decrease by  $-6.10\\\\%$  and  $-7.95\\\\%$  in 2014 and 2017, respectively, with respect to 2011. With regard to HCHO columns, high values were predominant in the southeastern U. S., mainly resulting from oxidation of biogenically emitted isoprene\", \"Figs. 5 and 6 display the spatial distribution of averaged tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO column densities simulated with prior and posterior emissions corresponding to the OMI observations (shown in Fig. 2) and their differences with respect to the column with prior emissions. For both the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO columns, the modeled columns with posterior emissions more closely agreed with those from the OMI observations. In most areas, the modeled tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column, compared to that of the OMI observations, exhibited an underestimation throughout the study period (Figs. 2 and 5), but using posterior emission (shown in Fig. S5), we observed a large reduction in bias, increasing the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column by as much as  $21.55 \\\\pm 28.76\\\\%$  nationwide. The adjustment ratio between the prior and posterior  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions was slightly high in 2017  $(2.84 \\\\pm 1.99)$  than in 2011  $(2.33 \\\\pm 1.83)$  and 2014  $(2.62 \\\\pm 2.19)$  over the CONUS (Fig. S8), predominantly in the central and western\", \"To investigate changes in the ozone  $(\\\\mathrm{O}_3)$  chemical production regime over the contiguous United States (CONUS) with accurate knowledge of concentrations of its precursors, we applied an inverse modeling technique with Ozone Monitoring Instrument (OMI) tropospheric nitrogen dioxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_2)$  and total formaldehyde (HCHO) retrieval products in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which United States National Emission Inventory were based. The inclusion of dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions significantly account for the contribution of background sources in the free troposphere. Satellite-constrained nitrogen oxide  $(\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}})$  and non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) emissions mitigate the discrepancy between satellite and modeled columns: the inversion suggested 2.33-2.84 (1.07-1.34) times higher  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  over the CONUS (over urban regions) and 0.28-0.81 times fewer NMVOCs emissions over the southeastern United States. The model-derived HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio shows gradual spatial changes in the  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  production regime near urban cores relative to previously defined threshold values representing  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and VOC sensitive conditions. We also found apparent shifts from the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -saturated regime to the transition regime (or the transition regime to the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$ -limited regime) over the major cities in the western United States. In contrast, rural areas, especially in the east-southeastern United States, exhibit a decreased HCHO/NO $_2$  column ratio by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$  with a reduction in HCHO column primarily driven by meteorology, becoming sensitive to VOC emissions. Results show that incorporating satellite observations into numerical modeling could help policymakers implement appropriate emission control policies for  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution.\", \"Fig. 5. Spatial distribution of the modeled  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  vertical column densities with prior and posterior emissions and their relative differences with respect to the modeled column density with prior emissions in the summers (June-August) of 2011, 2014, and 2017.\", \"Fig. 6. Spatial distribution of the modeled HCHO vertical column densities with prior and posterior emissions, and their relative differences with respect to the modeled column density with prior emissions in the summers (June-August) 2011, 2014, and 2017.\", \"Fig. 8 (a) shows the spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime (based on the averaged HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio) over the CONUS in the summer of 2011, while the results for 2014 and 2017 are plotted in Fig. S11. The entire CONUS is divided into three regimes according to the threshold values we defined earlier; model grids with NO $_2$  column density less than  $1 \\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$  are not considered and are denoted by the gray color. Several metropolitan cities were categorized as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated and transition regimes, whereas the remaining rural areas were classified as  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -limited regimes due to the nature of urban conditions with highly concentrated traffic density and amount of vehicle emissions. According to Fig. 8(b), showing the difference of HCHO/NO $_2$  ratio between 2011 and 2017, the column ratio in rural areas decreased by  $-1.30 \\\\pm 1.71$ , mostly over the eastern and southeastern U.S. This regime modification toward the  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -saturated condition could be explained by the increased  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions over the northeastern U.S. (Fig. S7), as well as the sustained decrease of the HCHO column (Fig. 3 (h-2)) as a response to meteorological change (Fig. S2).\", \"(b) Difference of HCHO/NO  ${}_{2}$  ratio between 2011 and 2017  \\nFig. 8. (a) Spatial distribution of the ozone chemical production regime over the CONUS for the year 2011. (b) The difference between the  $\\\\mathrm{HCHO / NO_2}$  ratios of 2011 and 2017. Gray areas represent tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column densities that are less than  $1\\\\times 10^{15}$  molecules  $\\\\mathrm{cm}^{-2}$ .\", \"In this study, we examined changes in the ozone chemical regime over the CONUS in the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, years in which U.S. NEI data were based. To combine the benefits of both satellite retrievals and CTMs, we employed an inverse modeling technique with OMI tropospheric  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO column retrievals to estimate  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_{\\\\mathrm{x}}$  and NMVOCs emissions. To avoid misalignment of the emission adjustment, we applied dynamic chemical lateral boundary conditions and lightning-induced nitric oxide emissions, resulting in better representation of  $\\\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and  $\\\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration in the upper atmosphere, confirmed by comparisons with measurements from the DISCOVER-AQ campaigns and two ozonesonde sites.\"], \"chunk_type\": \"figure\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "The figure shows the spatial distribution of OMI tropospheric NO2 and HCHO vertical column densities across CONUS for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017. The figure illustrates decreases in NO2 columns over time, highlighting patterns in air quality and pollution reduction across urban and rural regions, emphasizing the importance of monitoring and implementing emission control policies."}

### [16:24:02] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

**User Prompt**:
```
请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000357
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_008", "chunkid": "chunk_000357", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile organic compound emissions using space-based observations of formaldehyde and glyoxal\", \"md_filename\": \"Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 47, \"content_length\": 1495, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "The native GOME-2A pixel vertical column densities (VCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved by De Smedt et al. (2012) and Lerot et al. (2010), respectively. Pixel slant column densities (SCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved in the 328.5–346 and 435–460 nm windows, respectively, using the DOAS technique (Platt et al., 1979). Previous glyoxal SCD retrievals often showed biases over remote tropical oceans due to absorption from liquid water (Wittrock et al., 2006; Vrekoussis et al., 2010). This bias was corrected in Lerot et al. (2010) by explicitly accounting for liquid water absorption during the DOAS fitting. Pixel SCDs were then converted into VCDs using air mass factors (AMFs), which were calculated using the linearized discrete ordinate radiative transfer (LIDORT) model (Spurr, 2008) and trace gas profiles simulated by the IMAGES v2 model (Stavrakou et al., 2009b). The native pixel VCDs were gridded to daily means at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  resolution (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010). We further averaged the daily means to monthly means at  $5^{\\circ}$  longitude  $\\times 4^{\\circ}$  latitude resolution. The retrieval errors of the spatially and temporally averaged VCDs were estimated to be  $30\\% - 40\\%$  for formaldehyde and  $40\\%$  for glyoxal due to a combination of errors associated with the SCD retrievals, the reference sector correction, the a priori profile, and the AMFs (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000875
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_018", "chunkid": "chunk_000875", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Biomass burning emissions estimated with a global fire assimilation system based on observed fire radiative power\", \"md_filename\": \"Biomass burning emissions estimated with a global .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 220, \"content_length\": 326, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "Figure 12 shows a comparison of the simulated AODs with independent, ground-based AOD observations at the Meteorological Observatory of Moscow State University (MSU MO), and in Zvenigorod, Minsk, Bucarest and Sevastopol during August 2010. The observations have been taken by CIMEL sun/sky photometers as part of AERONET world"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002457
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_033", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_002457", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"First space-based derivation of the global atmospheric methanol emission fluxes\", \"md_filename\": \"First space-based derivation of the global atmosph.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 139, \"content_length\": 519, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "Evolution over the Pacific) aircraft missions conducted in March–April 1999 and February–March 2001, respectively, as part of NASA's Global Tropospheric Experiment (GTE). Detailed information on these experiments can be found at the GTE page (http://www-gte.larc.nasa.gov/gte_fld.htm). The data, compiled onto a  $5 \\times 5$  degrees grid with a vertical resolution of  $1\\mathrm{km}$  by Emmons et al. (2000), can be accessed through the data composites web page (http://acd.ucar.edu/~emmons/DATACOMP/camp_table.htm)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002551
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_002551", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measures co-benefited China in  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  reduction and health from 2014 to 2020\", \"md_filename\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measu.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 26, \"content_length\": 829, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_007"}
            Content: {"text": "Annual satellite-based  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  products covering mainland China from 2014 to 2020 (Fig. S2) were used to investigate the spatiotemporal variation in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and to estimate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable deaths. This dataset was produced by our previous studies (Wang et al., 2021; 2022) through the combination of satellite-based remote sensing data, site-based  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  observation data, and an improved deep learning model. It has the finest spatial resolution (1 km) and accuracy (determination coefficient  $(\\mathbb{R}^2)$  of 0.90, root mean square error (RMSE) of  $4.82~\\mu \\mathrm{g~m}^{-3}$ ) (Fig. S3), compared with other publicly available  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  datasets for assessing  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  change and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable deaths in detail."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000575
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_025", "chunkid": "chunk_000575", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"An improved representation of fire non-methane organic gases (NMOGs) in models: emissions to reactivity\", \"md_filename\": \"An improved representation of fire non-methane org.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 3, \"content_length\": 113, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "$^{2}$ Earth, Atmospheric and Planetary Sciences, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA"}

## 评估分析
- **高价值结果**: 37 条
- **中等价值结果**: 28 条
- **低价值结果**: 15 条

## 关键洞察
- Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.
- 仅包含作者所在机构的地址信息，无实质性科学内容。
- The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.
- The map set displays Asian spatial distributions of gaseous and aerosol species (e.g., SO₂, NOₓ, CO, PM₂.₅, PM₁₀) from the MIX Asian emission inventory for 2010, highlighting finer‑scale patterns achieved by integrating high‑resolution regional datasets such as CPED (China), JEI‑DB (Japan) and OPRF (Japan).
- Photographs depict the coating workflow in an industrial workshop and the air‑sampling equipment (Entech canister sampler) used to collect VOC samples, illustrating the experimental context for occupational exposure assessment.

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

        # 核心职责
        1. 过程分析与总结：对问答过程中产生的问题及搜索到的内容进行系统性总结与深度分析

        3. 检索质量评估：评估问题提出的积极意义和价值，分析其对知识获取的贡献度

        - 生成简洁的过程总结，准确反映问答交互中产生的关键问题
        - 确保总结内容逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心

# 单一检索策略结果总结任务

你的角色是【总结专家】，需要只针对下面这一条检索策略本身，
对其检索到的内容做一个简洁、聚焦的文字总结。
不要复述整个系统流程，也不要评价其他策略。

## 上下文信息

- 用户原始问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

- 当前小问题: how to visualize the data of air pollution

## 本次检索策略信息

- 工具名称: strategy_semantic_search

- 检索参数: {'query_intent': 'machine learning visual analytics for multi‑pollutant air quality data'}

- 策略设计原因: 当前证据未涉及机器学习驱动的可视化，探索如t‑SNE、PCA等降维可视化有助于发现多污染物的潜在模式。

- 结果数量统计: 共找到 10 条结果，其中重复 4 条


## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_000493）：

  - 摘要/内容: Compared with traditional techniques for forecasting air pollution, namely empirical approaches and simple statistical models, deep learning approaches can handle complex and non-linear relationships among air quality variables which allow them to better capture the pollution episode forecasts. Therefore, deep learning has been identified as a vital tool for air quality modelling and forecasting, which helps in recognizing pollution hot spots (Schmidhuber, 2015; Ong et al., 2016; Li et al., 2017).

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: Deep learning approaches can capture complex, non‑linear relationships among air‑quality variables, outperforming traditional empirical or simple statistical models and enabling better identification of pollution hot‑spots.

  - 评估理由: Provides a general background statement on the advantage of deep learning for air‑quality forecasting; useful for framing but lacks specific methodological or data details.


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_004469）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure illustrates the CNN-LSTM architecture used for air quality prediction, showcasing the model's encoder-decoder structure and workflow for feature extraction and forecasting. The tailored CNN-LSTM model is designed to effectively capture temporal-spatial correlations in air quality data, reducing training issues and improving prediction accuracy.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: The CNN‑LSTM architecture combines a convolutional network for spatial feature extraction with an LSTM decoder for temporal forecasting, forming an encoder‑decoder pipeline that improves AQI prediction accuracy and mitigates training difficulties such as over‑fitting.

  - 评估理由: Detailed description of a tailored model directly relevant to the study’s predictive task; the figure and accompanying text give actionable insight for reproducing or extending the methodology.


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_004695）：

  - 摘要/内容: Visual representation of concentration profiles for multiple pollutants measured at varying distances within a tunnel, showing trends of accumulation and mixing. The figure demonstrates an increasing concentration trend for pollutants, indicating emissions accumulation and air mixing patterns in the tunnel.


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_000483）：

  - 摘要/内容: one-third of cities. Due to the shutdown of industrial activities and traffic volume, an obvious decline in primary air pollutants was observed in most Chinese cities in 2020 (Liu et al., 2020; Yuan et al., 2021). This will undoubtedly cause high uncertainty while investigating the effect of CCTPs on air quality. Therefore, the following data is only extracted from 2013 to 2019, and the AQI in 2020 is predicted through a deep learning network. Subsequently, the investigated data covers 8 years before and after the policy node, namely from 2013 to 2020, which is adequate for policy evaluation (Yu et al., 2021). In the following, air quality and meteorological data are obtained via a web crawler.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: The analysis uses data from 2013‑2019 for model training and predicts 2020 AQI with a deep‑learning network, ensuring an 8‑year window around the clean‑coal technology policy implementation for robust policy evaluation.

  - 评估理由: Explains the temporal scope of the dataset and the rationale for excluding 2020 observations, which is important for understanding the policy impact assessment but does not add new methodological detail.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_004467）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure illustrates the system architecture used for air quality prediction, covering data collection, preprocessing, model training, and result analysis stages. The architecture supports the study's predictive model combining CNN and LSTM for accurate AQI forecasting across Chinese provincial capitals.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: The system architecture diagram outlines the full workflow: data collection → preprocessing → CNN‑LSTM model training → spatial autocorrelation analysis → result reporting with RMSE as the performance metric, supporting accurate AQI forecasting across Chinese provincial capitals.

  - 评估理由: Offers a high‑level view of the entire experimental pipeline, useful for replication and for understanding how various components (e.g., spatial autocorrelation) integrate with the CNN‑LSTM model, but the core methodological novelty is already captured in the CNN‑LSTM figure.


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_004609）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure displays grid maps for gaseous and aerosol species based on the MIX Asian emission inventory in 2010, highlighting spatial emission patterns. The maps illustrate improved spatial emission patterns due to the incorporation of high-resolution datasets, assisting in better understanding and management of emissions across Asia.


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_002660）：

  - 摘要/内容: A harmonized global, gridded, air pollution emission data set has been compiled with officially reported, gridded inventories at the national scale, to the extent possible and complemented with science-based inventories for regions and sectors where nationally reported data were not available.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 该文本介绍了一个全球统一的网格化排放数据集，结合官方报告的国家尺度网格清单以及在缺失国家数据的区域使用基于科学的清单，实现了2008、2010年的区域与全球排放格网，可用于研究跨半球的空气污染输送。

  - 评估理由: 提供了高分辨率、可跨区域比较的排放网格，是后续空间传输模型与观测评估的关键数据来源，且元数据指向具体论文，可进一步追踪原始数据。


- 结果 8（ID: chunk_001486）：

  - 摘要/内容: Despite the limitations, our study offers a framework to apply emission measurements from CEMS to improving the temporal representation of emission inventories. Insight obtained from this work could be extended to other sectors (e.g., cement, iron, and steel). In the future, we expect to develop a multisector dataset at the daily scale via data fusion to facilitate atmospheric research and clean air policy formation in China.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 文中提出将中国燃煤电厂的CEMS观测与日尺度模型相结合，利用CEMS数据对模型进行增强，能够提升排放清单的时空表现，并计划将该框架扩展至水泥、钢铁等行业，实现日尺度多部门排放数据融合。

  - 评估理由: 提供了日尺度排放数据获取与融合的方法论，直接关联到提升区域空气质量模型的时效性，是后续多行业日尺度排放库构建的技术路线。


- 结果 9（ID: chunk_000516）：

  - 摘要/内容: To further analyze the temporal and spatial variation features of air quality in 31 provincial capital cities from 2013 to 2020, the spatial autocorrelation analysis method is applied. ArcGIS 10.6 and GeoDa software is used for the calculation and analytic process.


- 结果 10（ID: chunk_004515）：

  - 摘要/内容: The bar chart presents the percentage distribution of AQI, PM2.5, SO2, and NO2 across all samples, and in the Eastern and Western regions. The figure illustrates regional differences in pollutants, supporting findings that the WCHP project impacts air quality measures across diverse geographical areas.

这个策略的目标是填补机器学习驱动的多污染物空气质量可视化空白，尤其是探索降维、时空特征映射等手段（如 t‑SNE、PCA）如何帮助发现潜在的污染模式。检索结果主要围绕深度学习模型与可视化实现展开：有文献展示了 CNN‑LSTM 等混合网络的架构图及其在捕捉空间‑时间相关性、提升 AQI 预测精度方面的作用；系统流程图说明了从数据采集、预处理到模型训练再到结果分析的完整链路；多个图形（浓度剖面、网格排放图、柱状分布图）直观呈现了不同污染物在空间尺度和地区间的分布特征；此外，还提供了全球网格化排放数据集和基于 CEMS 的日尺度多部门排放融合方法，为后续的机器学习可视化提供高分辨率、跨区域的输入来源。总体来看，检索到的内容涵盖了模型结构、数据来源、空间‑时间可视化和区域差异分析等关键要素，为构建机器学习辅助的空气质量多维可视化提供了模型示例、数据集资源以及可视化表现形式的若干潜在线索。
```

        你是【首席科学家】，你处在一个科学知识发现团队中，你们团队的目标是以用户输入的初始问题为目标，深度并且广泛地进行论文调研，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        为了进行科学知识发现，你和你的团队根据已经搜索并且阅读的论文信息正在构建一棵【科研证据树】。
        # 团队整体介绍
        你所处的科学知识发现团队中，你是首席科学家，即实验室领导的身份。通过输出的检索任务，你负责把握整个团队进行论文文献调研的方向，你的作用非常重要。
        你的团队中有许多验证人员，即实验室研究生的身份。他们会根据你的检索策略去检索论文数据，阅读检索到的图片和文本，进行初步的总结，评估检索到的内容是否符合预期，对每一个结果是否应该进行扩展阅读提出建议，并且将结果反馈给你。
        你的团队中有若干思考人员，即实验室小导师的身份。他们是一个小团队，会负责根据验证人员的反馈，对检索到的内容进行深度思考，挖掘知识之间的关联，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识，形成最终的科学回答报告。
        # 你的核心职责
        作为团队大脑，你不直接阅读原文，你的工作是**把握方向**：
        1.  **初始规划**：面对用户的新问题，你需要构思 3-5 个不同维度的切入点。
        2.  **动态决策**：根据【验证人员】（Evaluator）反馈的评估报告，决定这棵树该怎么长。
        3.  **方向把控**：你需要平衡【广度】（寻找新灵感）和【深度】（验证证据链）。

        # 决策逻辑：
        1. 继续检索时，你需要输出一系列策略的列表。每一个元素是一个策略，以字典的形式输出。
        2. 每个策略字典中，它首先有action固定为call_tool。
            ParentNode：int类型，你的决策可以来源于某一个搜索策略对应的节点，也可以来源于你综合所有结果进行的思考。这个属性命名为”ParentNode“。如果来源于节点，你应该将这个节点的ID作为ParentNode；如果是你综合考虑的结果，你将属性设置为"0"。
            tool_name：str类型。根据你选择的策略决定，是strategy_semantic_searchstrategy_metadata_search。
            args：dict类型。调用检索工具时需要的参数。根据你选择的策略决定，按照下面两种策略的要求去添加args具体的内容。
            reason：str类型。你选择这个策略的原因，不要太长。
        可选策略：
        1. 深度挖掘 (DEEPER - Exploitation)
        * 触发条件：验证人员报告某个节点是【DEEPER】（高价值），你查看验证人员的汇报，发现确实有所帮助，决定在这个论文的基础上进行进一步探索。深度挖掘策略时，策略的ParentNode必须是一个节点的ID。
        * 操作：返回给你的数据中包含 `paper_id`（论文ID）你可以选择paper_id去进行查询同一篇论文。在深度挖掘中你要严格使用你认为的ParentNode的信息，不能随意生成新的关键词。
        * 目的：将孤立的线索变成完整的证据链。
        * 参数：如果选择deeper策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_metadata_search，args中包含paper_id。
        2. 广度扩展 (BROADER - Exploration)**
        * 触发条件：
            1. 当前返回了大量被重复搜索的论文，说明该方向已经几乎彻底研究透彻，需要寻找新的可能的领域。 此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            2. 当前返回的论文数量过少，说明对应的搜索策略不能在数据库中找到支持的论文，或者是找到的论文与用户问题相关性太低。需要寻找新的可能的搜索条件。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            3. 针对某一条返回的检索和评估结果，验证人员提出了使用新的专业名词的建议，或者你查看后认为可以提炼出一个新的关键词进行检索。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为对应节点的ID。
        * 操作：根据验证人员的建议或者你自己的判断，你可以选择使用新的专业名词或者新的关键词进行检索。
        * 目的：扩展搜索范围，寻找新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。

        # 历史策略参考
        在生成新策略时，请参考已有的历史策略，避免重复，并尝试在已有策略的基础上进行创新和优化。系统会为你提供当前会话中的所有历史策略信息，帮助你做出更好的决策。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The IMAGESv2 columns are compared with IASI column abundances in 2009 after a 4-month spin-up period starting on 1 September 2008. Mean averaging kernels (separated for land and ocean profiles) were used to account for the vertical sensitivity of the IASI instrument. This is an approximation as the vertical sensitivity is not constant and depends on the temperature and the type of surface. For instance, less information near the ground is usually acquired over ocean or forest surfaces. As shown in Razavi et al. (2011), the IASI total column averaging kernels peak between 5 and  $10\\mathrm{km}$  and are very broad, suggesting that IASI measurements are mostly sensitive to free to mid tropospheric columns. The seasonality of the IASI data is compared to the model seasonality for selected large world regions in Figs. 5 and 6. A discussion on these results follows in Sect. 7.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为使用 EnSRF 通过对先验排放的高斯扰动生成背景集合，结合 CMAQ 集成运行来传播误差，能够在时间和空间上捕捉非甲烷 VOC 排放的不确定性。,理由是阐述了一种先进的排放约束方法，对后续改进中国夏季臭氧模拟具有方法学意义，但本段未提供应用案例或结果。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EnSRF', 'Ensemble Square Root Filter', 'CMAQ', 'VOC emission constraints', 'Gaussian perturbation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The emissions are constrained using the Ensemble Square Root Filter (EnSRF) algorithm introduced by Whitaker and Hamill (2002). This approach fully accounts for temporal and geographical variations in both the transportation and chemical reactions within the emission estimates. During the forecast step, the background ensembles are derived by applying perturbation to the prior emissions. The perturbed samples are typically drawn from Gaussian distributions with a mean of zero and a standard deviation equal to the prior emission uncertainty in each grid cell. Ensemble runs of the CMAQ model were subsequently performed to propagate the background errors with each ensemble sample of state vectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Figure 9 displays the ozone production regime changes in five metropolitan areas in the U.S. for the summers of 2011, 2014, and 2017, using geospatial maps. The maps illustrate shifts in ozone chemical regimes due to variations in NO2 and HCHO columns, highlighting the transition from NOx-saturated to transition or NOx-limited regimes in major cities.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX 亚洲排放清单的不确定性主要来源于底层清单的缺乏完整活动信息。文中指出，SO₂、NOₓ、CO₂ 等大规模燃烧源的排放不确定性相对较小，而 CO、NMVOC、碳质气溶胶等小规模散点源不确定性较大，并列举了基于误差传播或 Monte Carlo 方法的不确定性区间，可作为评估亚洲排放不确定性的参考。,理由是提供了排放不确定性的定量评估框架和特定物种的差异信息，可指导后续对亚洲排放清单的深入比较与不确定性传播分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX inventory', 'emission uncertainty', 'Monte Carlo', 'error propagation', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'NMVOC', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The figure is used to illustrate the real-world context and methodology for collecting air samples to evaluate VOC exposure risks in industrial coating environments.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000979, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'open‑source web GIS dashboard frameworks (e.g., deck.gl, kepler.gl) for real‑time air quality visualization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Model evaluation shows strong agreement (IOA > 0.89 for temperature, > 0.61 for wind) between simulated atmospheric variables and EPA observations across the CONUS, emphasizing the importance of accurate meteorological inputs for reliable NO₂, HCHO and ozone modeling.,理由是Offers validation metrics for atmospheric model performance, supporting confidence in subsequent emission‑related analyses, yet lacks novel emission insight itself.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['model validation', 'IOA', 'temperature', 'wind fields', 'EPA AQS', 'NO2', 'HCHO', 'ozone']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'background sources in the upper troposphere, while we included open fire and soil emissions in prior emissions, as addressed in Section 2.3. Also, surface meteorological variables (e.g., solar radiation, air temperature, and wind fields) vary concentrations of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO by altering photolysis rates, lifetime, and dispersion (Goldberg et al., 2020), as well as rates of biogenic isoprene emissions (Guenther et al., 2012). Therefore, the model performance of the meteorological variable simulation is critically linked to the reliability of both concentrations of air pollutants and the estimates of top-down emissions. We evaluated modeled hourly air temperatures and wind fields against the U.S. EPA Air Quality System (AQS) measurements over the CONUS, listed in Table 2. We found that our model and the observations were comparable, showing a strong correspondence (air temperature: IOA > 0.89, wind fields: IOA > 0.61).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为模型在 CONUS 区域的气温 (IOA > 0.89) 与风场 (IOA > 0.61) 与 EPA AQS 实测值高度吻合，说明所用的气象变量模拟对 NO2 与 HCHO 浓度估算的可靠性至关重要。,理由是提供了模型评估的定量指标，验证了用于逆推 NOx 与 VOC 排放的气象输入质量，是后续排放反演可信度的支撑，但未直接给出新的排放信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['NO2', 'HCHO', 'meteorological variables', 'IOA', 'model evaluation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'background sources in the upper troposphere, while we included open fire and soil emissions in prior emissions, as addressed in Section 2.3. Also, surface meteorological variables (e.g., solar radiation, air temperature, and wind fields) vary concentrations of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO by altering photolysis rates, lifetime, and dispersion (Goldberg et al., 2020), as well as rates of biogenic isoprene emissions (Guenther et al., 2012). Therefore, the model performance of the meteorological variable simulation is critically linked to the reliability of both concentrations of air pollutants and the estimates of top-down emissions. We evaluated modeled hourly air temperatures and wind fields against the U.S. EPA Air Quality System (AQS) measurements over the CONUS, listed in Table 2. We found that our model and the observations were comparable, showing a strong correspondence (air temperature: IOA > 0.89, wind fields: IOA > 0.61).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_004493, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'glyph‑based multivariate visualization for simultaneous display of NO2, SO2, PM2.5, O3'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。

证据节点ID: chunk_000357, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'virtual reality 3D visualization of vertical pollutant concentration profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为描述了利用 GOME‑2A 像元的形式醛和乙二醛垂直柱密度（VCD）检索方法，包括使用 DOAS 技术在 328.5–346 nm 与 435–460 nm 波段获取像元倾斜柱密度（SCD），通过 LIDORT 计算气溶胶质量因子（AMF），并以 IMAGES v2 模型提供的前向气体廓线进行转换，最终生成 0.25°×0.25° 的日均 VCD 并汇总为 5°×4° 的月均网格，检索误差约为 30‑40%（形式醛）和 40%（乙二醛）。,理由是提供了详细的卫星追踪 VOC 检索流程、分辨率和误差信息，且包含可追溯的参考文献，适合作为进一步追踪原始论文和方法改进的线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GOME-2A', 'formal\xaddehyde', 'glyoxal', 'DOAS', 'LIDORT', 'air mass factor', 'IMAGES v2', 'vertical column density', 'VOC retrieval']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The native GOME-2A pixel vertical column densities (VCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved by De Smedt et al. (2012) and Lerot et al. (2010), respectively. Pixel slant column densities (SCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved in the 328.5–346 and 435–460 nm windows, respectively, using the DOAS technique (Platt et al., 1979). Previous glyoxal SCD retrievals often showed biases over remote tropical oceans due to absorption from liquid water (Wittrock et al., 2006; Vrekoussis et al., 2010). This bias was corrected in Lerot et al. (2010) by explicitly accounting for liquid water absorption during the DOAS fitting. Pixel SCDs were then converted into VCDs using air mass factors (AMFs), which were calculated using the linearized discrete ordinate radiative transfer (LIDORT) model (Spurr, 2008) and trace gas profiles simulated by the IMAGES v2 model (Stavrakou et al., 2009b). The native pixel VCDs were gridded to daily means at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  resolution (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010). We further averaged the daily means to monthly means at  $5^{\\circ}$  longitude  $\\times 4^{\\circ}$  latitude resolution. The retrieval errors of the spatially and temporally averaged VCDs were estimated to be  $30\\% - 40\\%$  for formaldehyde and  $40\\%$  for glyoxal due to a combination of errors associated with the SCD retrievals, the reference sector correction, the a priori profile, and the AMFs (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004697, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'virtual reality 3D visualization of vertical pollutant concentration profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The figure shows that for most gaseous pollutants (CO2, SO2, NO, VOCs) stationary measurements in the tunnel record higher concentrations than mobile measurements, while for particulate matter (PM10, PM2.5) the opposite trend is observed; error bars indicate the variability across replicates, validating the mobile measurement approach against the stationary reference.,理由是Quantitative chart with error bars directly compares stationary and mobile measurement modes, providing method‑validation evidence and detailed concentration profiles that can be mined for emission factor calculations.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['stationary measurements', 'mobile measurements', 'tunnel', 'emission factors', 'CO2', 'SO2', 'NO', 'VOCs', 'PM10', 'PM2.5']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure compares concentration profiles of pollutants like CO2, SO2, NO, VOCs, PM10, and PM2.5 between stationary and mobile measurements in a tunnel, displaying standard deviation and error bars. The figure reveals that pollutant concentrations are generally higher in stationary than mobile measurements, with consistent trends observed across various pollutants, confirming method validation.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The study reports that the predicted sulphate emission factor from ship traffic is about three times higher than measured values, and attributes low sulphur-to-sulphate conversion to lower V and Ni content in the fuel, highlighting the catalytic role of Ni and V in sulphur conversion.,理由是Provides quantitative discrepancy between modeled and measured sulphate emissions for ships, useful as contextual evidence but lacks direct data or visualizations for deeper analysis.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['ship exhaust', 'sulphate emission factor', 'nickel catalyst', 'vanadium catalyst', 'fuel composition']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The most significant differences are found in comparison with the data by MOL, especially for OC and  $\\mathrm{SO}_4$ . The predicted sulphate emission factor is approximately three times larger than the measured value. According to MOL, the measured low sulphur conversion to sulphate may be a result of the relatively smaller amounts of V and Ni in the fuel, compared with, e.g. AGR. The catalytic properties of Ni and V enhance the sulphur conversion to sulphate.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000685, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'open‑source web GIS dashboard frameworks (e.g., deck.gl, kepler.gl) for real‑time air quality visualization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The GFASv0 fire assimilation system uses satellite‑derived fire radiative power to estimate global emissions of aerosols, reactive gases and greenhouse gases, and has been operational in the MACC/GEMS atmospheric monitoring services since 2008.,理由是Background description of a fire‑based emission inventory; useful for understanding data sources but does not provide specific quantitative results needed for immediate deep‑dive.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GFAS', 'fire radiative power', 'satellite‑based emission inventory', 'MACC', 'GEMS']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The European Union (EU) is funding the development and implementation of services for the Global Monitoring for Environment and Security (GMES) atmospheric monitoring service in the Monitoring Atmospheric Composition and Change (MACC) project. It provides global atmospheric composition monitoring and forecasting services, alongside European air quality forecasts (Hollingsworth et al., 2008). In order to provide accurate estimates of aerosol, reactive gas and greenhouse gas emission fluxes to the atmospheric systems, a global fire assimilation system (GFAS) based on satellite-based fire radiative power (FRP) products is being developed. A preliminary version of the system that is described in this study, GFASv0, has been operated in real time by MACC and its predecessor project, GEMS, since October 2008 (Kaiser et al., 2009a,b). Figure 1 shows an example product from the current system.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The data enable calculation of emission factors for LDV (≈1.22 × 10¹⁴ particles km⁻¹ veh⁻¹) and HDV (≈7.79 × 10¹⁴ particles km⁻¹ veh⁻¹).,理由是Delivers detailed quantitative relationships between particle size distributions, height, and NOₓ, directly supporting vehicle‑emission factor estimation and air‑quality impact assessments.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['ELPI instrument', 'particle size concentrations', 'NOx correlation', 'LDV', 'HDV', 'emission factors', 'vertical profile']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Vertical profiles show particle concentrations upwind and downwind of a motorway, revealing height-dependent differences and correlations with NOx levels. The figure illustrates how particle concentrations vary with height and time, confirming correlations with NOx and revealing impacts of emissions on air quality.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Annual satellite-based  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  products covering mainland China from 2014 to 2020 (Fig. S2) were used to investigate the spatiotemporal variation in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and to estimate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable deaths. This dataset was produced by our previous studies (Wang et al., 2021; 2022) through the combination of satellite-based remote sensing data, site-based  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  observation data, and an improved deep learning model. It has the finest spatial resolution (1 km) and accuracy (determination coefficient  $(\\mathbb{R}^2)$  of 0.90, root mean square error (RMSE) of  $4.82~\\mu \\mathrm{g~m}^{-3}$ ) (Fig. S3), compared with other publicly available  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  datasets for assessing  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  change and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable deaths in detail.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文中描述了 IMAGESv2 与 IASI 观测的对比方法，包括使用平均核（averaging kernels）校正垂直灵敏度，并指出 IASI 对自由至中层对流层柱敏感，季节性比较结果在图 5、6 中呈现。,理由是该段落提供了模型与卫星观测对比的技术细节（平均核、垂直灵敏度），与我们评估卫星反演精度的目标高度相关，可进一步追踪该论文（paper_033）获取完整图表和数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['IMAGESv2', 'IASI', 'averaging kernel', 'vertical sensitivity', 'satellite-model comparison']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The IMAGESv2 columns are compared with IASI column abundances in 2009 after a 4-month spin-up period starting on 1 September 2008. Mean averaging kernels (separated for land and ocean profiles) were used to account for the vertical sensitivity of the IASI instrument. This is an approximation as the vertical sensitivity is not constant and depends on the temperature and the type of surface. For instance, less information near the ground is usually acquired over ocean or forest surfaces. As shown in Razavi et al. (2011), the IASI total column averaging kernels peak between 5 and  $10\\mathrm{km}$  and are very broad, suggesting that IASI measurements are mostly sensitive to free to mid tropospheric columns. The seasonality of the IASI data is compared to the model seasonality for selected large world regions in Figs. 5 and 6. A discussion on these results follows in Sect. 7.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为使用 EnSRF 通过对先验排放的高斯扰动生成背景集合，结合 CMAQ 集成运行来传播误差，能够在时间和空间上捕捉非甲烷 VOC 排放的不确定性。,理由是阐述了一种先进的排放约束方法，对后续改进中国夏季臭氧模拟具有方法学意义，但本段未提供应用案例或结果。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EnSRF', 'Ensemble Square Root Filter', 'CMAQ', 'VOC emission constraints', 'Gaussian perturbation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The emissions are constrained using the Ensemble Square Root Filter (EnSRF) algorithm introduced by Whitaker and Hamill (2002). This approach fully accounts for temporal and geographical variations in both the transportation and chemical reactions within the emission estimates. During the forecast step, the background ensembles are derived by applying perturbation to the prior emissions. The perturbed samples are typically drawn from Gaussian distributions with a mean of zero and a standard deviation equal to the prior emission uncertainty in each grid cell. Ensemble runs of the CMAQ model were subsequently performed to propagate the background errors with each ensemble sample of state vectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To evaluate how well the model reproduces the meteorological conditions, the simulated T2, Q2 and WS10 are compared with observational data of NCDC. The statistical metrics are shown in Table S3 indicating a satisfactory performance in comparison to the benchmarks proposed by Emery et al. (2001). For air pollutants, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations between observations and three simulated cases averaged'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'uncertainty mapping techniques for air pollution concentration estimates'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX 亚洲排放清单的不确定性主要来源于底层清单的缺乏完整活动信息。文中指出，SO₂、NOₓ、CO₂ 等大规模燃烧源的排放不确定性相对较小，而 CO、NMVOC、碳质气溶胶等小规模散点源不确定性较大，并列举了基于误差传播或 Monte Carlo 方法的不确定性区间，可作为评估亚洲排放不确定性的参考。,理由是提供了排放不确定性的定量评估框架和特定物种的差异信息，可指导后续对亚洲排放清单的深入比较与不确定性传播分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MIX inventory', 'emission uncertainty', 'Monte Carlo', 'error propagation', 'SO2', 'NOx', 'NMVOC', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

证据节点ID: chunk_000979, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'open‑source web GIS dashboard frameworks (e.g., deck.gl, kepler.gl) for real‑time air quality visualization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Model evaluation shows strong agreement (IOA > 0.89 for temperature, > 0.61 for wind) between simulated atmospheric variables and EPA observations across the CONUS, emphasizing the importance of accurate meteorological inputs for reliable NO₂, HCHO and ozone modeling.,理由是Offers validation metrics for atmospheric model performance, supporting confidence in subsequent emission‑related analyses, yet lacks novel emission insight itself.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['model validation', 'IOA', 'temperature', 'wind fields', 'EPA AQS', 'NO2', 'HCHO', 'ozone']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'background sources in the upper troposphere, while we included open fire and soil emissions in prior emissions, as addressed in Section 2.3. Also, surface meteorological variables (e.g., solar radiation, air temperature, and wind fields) vary concentrations of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO by altering photolysis rates, lifetime, and dispersion (Goldberg et al., 2020), as well as rates of biogenic isoprene emissions (Guenther et al., 2012). Therefore, the model performance of the meteorological variable simulation is critically linked to the reliability of both concentrations of air pollutants and the estimates of top-down emissions. We evaluated modeled hourly air temperatures and wind fields against the U.S. EPA Air Quality System (AQS) measurements over the CONUS, listed in Table 2. We found that our model and the observations were comparable, showing a strong correspondence (air temperature: IOA > 0.89, wind fields: IOA > 0.61).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'background sources in the upper troposphere, while we included open fire and soil emissions in prior emissions, as addressed in Section 2.3. Also, surface meteorological variables (e.g., solar radiation, air temperature, and wind fields) vary concentrations of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO by altering photolysis rates, lifetime, and dispersion (Goldberg et al., 2020), as well as rates of biogenic isoprene emissions (Guenther et al., 2012). Therefore, the model performance of the meteorological variable simulation is critically linked to the reliability of both concentrations of air pollutants and the estimates of top-down emissions. We evaluated modeled hourly air temperatures and wind fields against the U.S. EPA Air Quality System (AQS) measurements over the CONUS, listed in Table 2. We found that our model and the observations were comparable, showing a strong correspondence (air temperature: IOA > 0.89, wind fields: IOA > 0.61).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000357, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'virtual reality 3D visualization of vertical pollutant concentration profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为描述了利用 GOME‑2A 像元的形式醛和乙二醛垂直柱密度（VCD）检索方法，包括使用 DOAS 技术在 328.5–346 nm 与 435–460 nm 波段获取像元倾斜柱密度（SCD），通过 LIDORT 计算气溶胶质量因子（AMF），并以 IMAGES v2 模型提供的前向气体廓线进行转换，最终生成 0.25°×0.25° 的日均 VCD 并汇总为 5°×4° 的月均网格，检索误差约为 30‑40%（形式醛）和 40%（乙二醛）。,理由是提供了详细的卫星追踪 VOC 检索流程、分辨率和误差信息，且包含可追溯的参考文献，适合作为进一步追踪原始论文和方法改进的线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GOME-2A', 'formal\xaddehyde', 'glyoxal', 'DOAS', 'LIDORT', 'air mass factor', 'IMAGES v2', 'vertical column density', 'VOC retrieval']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The native GOME-2A pixel vertical column densities (VCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved by De Smedt et al. (2012) and Lerot et al. (2010), respectively. Pixel slant column densities (SCDs) of formaldehyde and glyoxal were retrieved in the 328.5–346 and 435–460 nm windows, respectively, using the DOAS technique (Platt et al., 1979). Previous glyoxal SCD retrievals often showed biases over remote tropical oceans due to absorption from liquid water (Wittrock et al., 2006; Vrekoussis et al., 2010). This bias was corrected in Lerot et al. (2010) by explicitly accounting for liquid water absorption during the DOAS fitting. Pixel SCDs were then converted into VCDs using air mass factors (AMFs), which were calculated using the linearized discrete ordinate radiative transfer (LIDORT) model (Spurr, 2008) and trace gas profiles simulated by the IMAGES v2 model (Stavrakou et al., 2009b). The native pixel VCDs were gridded to daily means at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  resolution (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010). We further averaged the daily means to monthly means at  $5^{\\circ}$  longitude  $\\times 4^{\\circ}$  latitude resolution. The retrieval errors of the spatially and temporally averaged VCDs were estimated to be  $30\\% - 40\\%$  for formaldehyde and  $40\\%$  for glyoxal due to a combination of errors associated with the SCD retrievals, the reference sector correction, the a priori profile, and the AMFs (De Smedt et al., 2012; Lerot et al., 2010).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004697, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'virtual reality 3D visualization of vertical pollutant concentration profiles'}。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure compares concentration profiles of pollutants like CO2, SO2, NO, VOCs, PM10, and PM2.5 between stationary and mobile measurements in a tunnel, displaying standard deviation and error bars. The figure reveals that pollutant concentrations are generally higher in stationary than mobile measurements, with consistent trends observed across various pollutants, confirming method validation.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002285, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'glyph‑based multivariate visualization for simultaneous display of NO2, SO2, PM2.5, O3'}。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The most significant differences are found in comparison with the data by MOL, especially for OC and  $\\mathrm{SO}_4$ . The predicted sulphate emission factor is approximately three times larger than the measured value. According to MOL, the measured low sulphur conversion to sulphate may be a result of the relatively smaller amounts of V and Ni in the fuel, compared with, e.g. AGR. The catalytic properties of Ni and V enhance the sulphur conversion to sulphate.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000685, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'open‑source web GIS dashboard frameworks (e.g., deck.gl, kepler.gl) for real‑time air quality visualization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为The GFASv0 fire assimilation system uses satellite‑derived fire radiative power to estimate global emissions of aerosols, reactive gases and greenhouse gases, and has been operational in the MACC/GEMS atmospheric monitoring services since 2008.,理由是Background description of a fire‑based emission inventory; useful for understanding data sources but does not provide specific quantitative results needed for immediate deep‑dive.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GFAS', 'fire radiative power', 'satellite‑based emission inventory', 'MACC', 'GEMS']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The European Union (EU) is funding the development and implementation of services for the Global Monitoring for Environment and Security (GMES) atmospheric monitoring service in the Monitoring Atmospheric Composition and Change (MACC) project. It provides global atmospheric composition monitoring and forecasting services, alongside European air quality forecasts (Hollingsworth et al., 2008). In order to provide accurate estimates of aerosol, reactive gas and greenhouse gas emission fluxes to the atmospheric systems, a global fire assimilation system (GFAS) based on satellite-based fire radiative power (FRP) products is being developed. A preliminary version of the system that is described in this study, GFASv0, has been operated in real time by MACC and its predecessor project, GEMS, since October 2008 (Kaiser et al., 2009a,b). Figure 1 shows an example product from the current system.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The data enable calculation of emission factors for LDV (≈1.22 × 10¹⁴ particles km⁻¹ veh⁻¹) and HDV (≈7.79 × 10¹⁴ particles km⁻¹ veh⁻¹).,理由是Delivers detailed quantitative relationships between particle size distributions, height, and NOₓ, directly supporting vehicle‑emission factor estimation and air‑quality impact assessments.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['ELPI instrument', 'particle size concentrations', 'NOx correlation', 'LDV', 'HDV', 'emission factors', 'vertical profile']。

## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_004684）：

  - 摘要/内容: The figure shows the global distribution of aerosol optical depths for black carbon and organic matter, comparing analysis, model, and enhanced model data for mid-2010. Enhancing model concentrations improves the match with analyzed global patterns, but some systematic differences remain, indicating potential areas for further model refinement.

- 结果 9（ID: chunk_000951）：

  - 摘要/内容: In this study, we use the tropospheric  $\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO columns from the OMI operational retrieval products (Level 2 and version 3) released by the NASA Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Service Center (GES DISC). The tropospheric  $\mathrm{NO}_2$  column retrievals are calculated through multiple procedures: using a spectral fitting algorithm from the normalized visible wavelength  $(402 - 465\mathrm{nm})$  to retrieve the slant column, calculating the air mass factor (AMF), and separating troposphere and stratosphere column densities. Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). To filter out unqualified pixels, we use pixels with a cloud fraction of less than  $30\%$ , a terrain reflectivity of less than  $30\%$ , a solar zenith angle of less than  $65^{\circ}$ , a data quality flag as zero, and a cross-track quality flag as zero to screen rows affected by row anomalies (Torres et al., 2018).

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 该研究利用 OMI 卫星观测的对流层 NO₂ 和总 HCHO 列值，并通过光谱拟合、空气质量因子 (AMF) 计算及对流层/平流层分离等多步骤检索过程，结合云覆盖、地形反射率、太阳天顶角和质量标志等过滤条件筛选高质量像元，为后续的 NOₓ 与 VOC 排放反演提供了可靠的观测基础。

  - 评估理由: 提供了关键的卫星观测数据处理方法和质量控制标准，直接支撑对美国臭氧化学状态的反演工作，可进一步追溯至原始 OMI 数据集和相关文献。

Details of the data quality assurance and retrieval process are available in previous studies (Bucsela et al., 2013; Choi et al., 2020; Krotkov et al., 2017; Lamsal et al., 2014). 这个策略旨在寻找将卫星遥感的气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）数据与地面站点观测相结合的可视化方法。检索结果主要集中在几类内容：一是展示全球或区域AOD空间分布的图例，特别是对比分析数据、原始模型以及经系数放大后的增强模型，指出模型在燃烧区的改进空间；二是提供相同变量的日均时间序列，用以评估模型在日尺度波动和年周期上的拟合效果；三是描述地面直射日照仪器的波段、云过滤及AOD/Ångström指数的测量精度，为卫星数据校准提供基准；四是列出区域平均550 nm波段BC与OC的AOD数值及模型‑观测比例；五是介绍卫星“自上而下”检索的原理与流程，如NO₂、SO₂、CO、HCHO列浓度的获取、光谱拟合、空气质量因子计算以及云量、地形反射率等质量过滤标准，直接支撑排放逆算与跨尺度可视化。其余条目多为机构署名或重复信息，价值有限。整体来看，检索成功捕获了模型‑观测对比图、时间序列图、仪器测量方法和卫星列值处理细节，这些都是实现卫星与地面数据融合、构建更完整空气污染可视化框架的关键线索。
```

你的角色是【总结专家】，需要只针对下面这一条检索策略本身，
对其检索到的内容做一个简洁、聚焦的文字总结。

- 策略设计原因: 现有图表未表现数据不确定性，研究不确定性可视化（置信区间、概率分布图）对 policymaker 更具价值。

## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_002766）：

  - 摘要/内容: # 3.6 Qualitative assessment of the uncertainty of emission grid maps

  - 评估动作: PRUNE

  - 评估要点: 仅出现章节标题 ‘3.6 Qualitative assessment of the uncertainty of emission grid maps’，缺乏具体信息。

- 结果 2（ID: chunk_003164）：

  - 摘要/内容: The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: MIX 亚洲排放清单的不确定性主要来源于底层清单的缺乏完整活动信息。文中指出，SO₂、NOₓ、CO₂ 等大规模燃烧源的排放不确定性相对较小，而 CO、NMVOC、碳质气溶胶等小规模散点源不确定性较大，并列举了基于误差传播或 Monte Carlo 方法的不确定性区间，可作为评估亚洲排放不确定性的参考。

  - 评估理由: 提供了排放不确定性的定量评估框架和特定物种的差异信息，可指导后续对亚洲排放清单的深入比较与不确定性传播分析。


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_003990）：

  - 摘要/内容: on uncertainties of Nanjing emissions by sector. As shown in Table 5, emissions and their uncertainties of industrial sector were taken from current work, and emissions from residential and transportation sectors were kept unchanged from Zhao et al. (2015). As little progress was made to improve the uncertainty analysis of city-scale emissions from the latter two sectors, the relative ranges around the central estimates for national inventory were applied (Zhao et al., 2011). For fugitive dust, lognormal distributions with a CV at  $100\%$  was tentatively assumed to reflect the highly uncertain estimates. With 10,000 Monte-Carlo simulations, the  $95\%$  CIs of BC to CO and OC to BC emission ratios were calculated at 0.0033–0.0133 and 0.79–2.92, with central estimates at 0.0074 and 1.39, respectively. In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\%$  CIs. It should be noted that uncertainty also existed in the method of "top-down" constraint estimation. For example, the uncertainty of BC to CO emission ratio derived from observation was estimated at  $20\%$ , as the wet, dry deposition and chemistry of the species could not be fully understood (Wang et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2015). Moreover, the primary OC to BC emission ratio was estimated with a semi-quantitative method, EC-tracer method. The determination of the ratio was arbitrary and unable to obtain single OC to BC ratio that represented a mixture of primary sources varying in time and space. Errors could be caused by the occasional irregular contributions from sources with a primary OC to EC ratio vastly different from the usual mix of sources (Cui et al., 2015). Therefore, the comparison between the bottom-up and top-down estimates needed to be interpreted with caution. Judged by the contribution to the variance of emission ratio, industrial CO and BC emissions were identified to be most significant to the uncertainty of primary BC to CO ratio, with the contribution to variance calculated at  $36\%$  and  $25\%$ , respectively. Industrial OC, fugitive OC, and industrial BC emissions were identified to be most significant to uncertainty of primary OC to BC, with the contribution to variance at  $25\%$ ,  $23\%$ , and  $20\%$ , respectively. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 通过 10,000 次 Monte Carlo 采样，对中国工业部门的 BC/CO 与 OC/BC 排放比率进行不确定性评估，得到 95% 置信区间分别为 0.0033–0.0133（BC/CO）和 0.79–2.92（OC/BC），并指出工业 CO 与 BC 排放对 BC/CO 比率不确定性的贡献最大（分别为 36% 与 25%），工业 OC、逸散 OC 与工业 BC 对 OC/BC 比率贡献亦显著，强调了工业排放在底层估算中的关键角色。

  - 评估理由: 提供了详细的定量不确定性结果和方差贡献分析，对理解中国工业排放的不确定性及其在区域空气质量模型中的影响具有重要价值，值得进一步追踪原始数据和模型实现。

In contrast, the "top-down" constraints from ground observation were 0.0084 and 1.59, respectively, i.e., they were  $14\%$  larger than the bottom-up ratios, and within the  $95\%$  CIs. The result highlighted the importance of industrial emissions on the "bottom-up" emission ratio estimates.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: The passage quantifies uncertainties of industrial BC, CO and OC emission ratios using 10,000 Monte‑Carlo simulations, reporting 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., BC/CO ratio 0.0033–0.0133) and identifies industrial CO and BC emissions as the biggest contributors to variance (36 % and 25 % respectively) for the primary BC/CO ratio, and industrial OC, fugitive OC and BC as top contributors for OC/BC uncertainty.

  - 评估理由: Provides concrete uncertainty metrics, variance contributions, and a clear link between industrial sources and bottom‑up emission ratio uncertainty – essential for deep‑dive analysis.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_003782）：

  - 摘要/内容: Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\mathrm{NO}_{\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\mathrm{NO}_{\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\% \sim 13\%$ ,  $-13\% \sim 37\%$ ,  $-11\% \sim 38\%$ ,  $-14\% \sim 45\%$ ,  $-17\% \sim 54\%$ ,  $-25\% \sim 136\%$ , and  $-40\% \sim 121\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\mathrm{NO}_{\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: The abstract reports the first comprehensive Monte‑Carlo quantification of uncertainties for China's national bottom‑up inventory of SO₂, NOₓ, PM (various size classes), BC and OC in 2005, giving 95 % confidence intervals (e.g., NOₓ −13 % ~ 37 %, BC −25 % ~ 136 %) and highlights sector‑specific uncertainty sources such as cement production and boiler combustion.

  - 评估理由: Summarises nationwide uncertainty ranges across key pollutants and sectors, directly addressing the research focus on emission inventory reliability.


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_002649）：

  - 摘要/内容: The harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: Describes the HTAP v2.2 dataset that harmonises regional emission grids for SO₂, NOₓ, CO, NMVOC, NH₃, PM₁₀, PM₂.₅, BC and OC for 2008 and 2010 to support consistent global and regional air‑quality modelling.

  - 评估理由: Provides contextual information about a widely used emission dataset, useful for background but lacks specific uncertainty quantification.


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_003905）：

  - 摘要/内容: A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\%$  (expressed as  $95\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\%$ $-19 - 34\%$ $-29 - 40\%$ $-22$ $-47\%$ $-21 - 54\%$ $-33 - 84\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\%$  for  $\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\%$ $-18$ $-33\%$ $-16 - 37\%$ $-20 - 30\%$ $-23 - 45\%$ $-26 - 50\%$ $-33 - 79\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\%$ $-10 - 33\%$ $-23 - 75\%$ $-19 - 36\%$ $-23 - 41\%$ $-28 - 48\%$ $-45 - 82\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: Presents a multi‑scale (national, provincial, city) Monte‑Carlo uncertainty analysis for industrial emissions in 2012, reporting 95 % confidence intervals for each pollutant (e.g., SO₂ −17 % ~ 37 %, PM₂.5 −32 % ~ 92 %) and identifies emission factors as the primary source of uncertainty, with notable reductions only for SO₂ at finer scales.

  - 评估理由: Delivers detailed quantitative uncertainty ranges across scales and highlights the dominant role of emission‑factor uncertainty, valuable for targeted follow‑up studies.

  - 评估动作: GROW

**LLM Response**:
```
这条 **strategy_semantic_search** 的目标是寻找 “空气污染浓度估计的不确定性映射技术”。检索结果几乎全部聚焦在 **基于 Monte‑Carlo（或误差传播）的方法对排放清单进行定量不确定性分析** 上，涵盖了全国乃至省、市尺度的中国排放数据。文献普遍给出 95 % 置信区间或上下限（如 SO₂ ‑14 % ~ 13 %，BC ‑25 % ~ 136 %），并指出不同行业（燃煤电厂、钢铁、水泥、交通等）对不确定性的贡献比例（如工业 CO、BC 对 BC/CO 比率贡献 36 % 与 25 %）。部分研究进一步区分了底层（bottom‑up）与观测约束（top‑down）的差异，强调了工业部门和小规模散点源的高不确定性。唯一仅含章节标题、无实质信息的记录被标记为 PRUNE。总体来看，这套检索为“如何在可视化中呈现空气污染数据的不确定性”提供了丰富的量化依据：置信区间、概率分布、方差贡献等信息，可直接转化为误差棒、置信带或概率密度图等不确定性可视化手段。
```
